chapters.text: Masangin Uz gamsunga mi khat anachengin, ama chu amin Job akiti; Job kitipa hi nolnabeihel leh chondih tah ahin, Pathen ging khen cha um jing, lamse lam peldoh jing mi khat ahiye.
Job hin chapa sagi aneiyin, chanu jong thum aneiye.

Chule kelngoi sang sagi aneiyin, sangongsao jeng jong sang thum jen aneiye; bongchal jong loukai thei cheh ja nga aneiyin, sanganpi jong ja nga ma aneiye; chule soh le kol jong tam pi avul’in a hi; hijeh chun hiche Job kiti mipa hi niso lam gamkai sungse sea mi nasapen ahitai.
Job chapate hin apen nikhou alhin tengleh anikho lhingpa ina chun pen nikho golvah abol jiuvin, aban banin akitol’uvin, asopiu numei thum jong chu neh khom don khompi dingin akou jiuvin ahi.

Amahon hitobanga kut abol laiyu hileh Job hin mi a sol jin achate chu aga thenso jin ahi; chujongleh Job chu jingpi tah-in athoujin, achate jat dungjuiyin pumgo thilto abolpeh peh jie; ajeh chu Job hin aseiyin, “Ijem itileh kachapate hi chonsesa hiuvin tin, alungthim’uva jong Pathen agaosapsau hithei maiyin te,” ati ahi. Job chun hitobang hin tang louhel’in abol jing jenge.
Ni khat chun Pathen chapate jong acham chamin Pakai angsunga ahung kikhom’uvin ahileh, amaho lah a hin Satan jong ahung pang khai.

Hichun Pakaiyin Satan chu adongin, “Hoilama gache lea nahim?” atileh; Satan jong chun Pakai chu adonbut’in, “Leiset chunga kanung kama kaga lhah-in chule chung le noi kagakop ton, hichea kona hung kit kahi,” ati.

Chuphat’in Pakaiyin jong Satan jah a aseipeh-in, “Nangman kalhachapa Job khu iti nagel am, leiset chunga ama tobang mi aumpoi; nolnabeihel le chondih tah ahin, Pathen ging khen cha um jinga, lamse lam pel doh jing jeng mi ahime?” ati.
Chuphat’in Satan chun Pakai chu adonbut’in, “Job khun ajeh beiya Pathen agin a nabol ham?

Nangin asah lam alhang lam, a jet le aveiya ama hihen ainkote hijongleh chule anei jouse geiya kulpi kikaikhum banga na-umchah kheh jeh a khutia hi lou ham? Nangman akhut te nia anatoh jouse phatthei naboh-in, hijeh a chu gamsunga hi ama neile gou khangtou tul tul jeng ahi.
Tun jong nakhut lhangin lang anei jouse khu suhset peh le chun aman namai chang tah a nangma nagaosap jeng ding ahibouve,” atin ahi.

Hichea hin Pakaiyin Satan jah a aseiyin, “Vetan, aman anei agoujouse khu nangma thu thu ahi; ama tahsa hinkhoa vang nakhut nalhah thei louhel ding ahi,” atileh; Satan jong chu Pakai angsunga konin akondoh pai pai tai.
Ni khat hi Job chate chun aupa pen’u insunga apasal anumeiyin abonchan an anekhom’uvin adonkhom’uve;
hichea hin sottolle mi khat Job henga ahungin thu ahung lhut’in aseitai, “Bongchal ho chun lou akaiyun, akom’uva chun sangan hon ham pha aneuvin ahi;

hichun Seba miten gancha ho chu ahindel vuh paiyun, abonchan akikaiyuvin, gancha ching sohte jong abonchauvin chemjam in asat lih soh hel tauve, keima seh seh hi kachanga hung jamdoh nah nah kahi, hiche thu hi nangma kahung seipeh nahiye,” ahungti.

Amapa hin thu asei nalaiyin, sottolle mi khatma ahung pai kit’in aseitai, “Vana konin Pathen meikong ahung leng lhan, kelngoi jouse leh achinga pang sohte chu abonin akan ahalvamsoh tai; keima kachangseh a hung jamdoh a hiche thu hi nangma seipeh dia hung kahi,” ati kit tai.

Hichepa jong hin thu asei nalaiyin, sottolle khat jong ahung pai kit’in aseitai, “Chaldea mite loi thum jenin ahung kiloiyun, sangongsao jouse ahindel khum’uvin abonin akikai mangsoh keiyun, achinga pang sohte jong chemjam in asat lih soh keiyuvin, keima changseh seh hung jamdoh a hiche thu hi nangma seipeh dinga kahung ahi,” ati kit’in ahiye.
Amapa jong hin thu anasei nalaiyin, sottolle dang khat jong ahung paiyin aseitai. “Nachate pasal ho jong numeiho jong aupau apeng masapenpa insunga an aneuvin lengpitwi adon’uva ahileh;

vetan, gammang lah a konin huipi hattah-in ahung nungin, aum nau in chu aning lia ahin nuh a ahileh, ain chu gollhang nu-ngah ho chunga ahung chim lhan abonin adelphan adel lihsoh tai; keima kachangseh seh a hung jamdoh a hiche thu hi nangma seipeh dinga kahung ahi,” ati kit tai.
Chutah chun Job jong ading doh-in aponsil achol chu abottel jengin, alujang sam akivo chaiyin, tola akijam jengin Pathen a atao tai.

Hichea hin Job chun aseiyin, “Kanu oisunga naobua kona kasagoh keova hung pengdoh kahin, kasagoh keova kakile kit ding ahi; Pakaiyin eipeh ahin, Pakaiyin akilah kit ahitai; Pakai min chu nun nom hen,” ati.
Thilsoh hijat a hin Job chun chonset jong abolpon, Pathen jong amoso ngaipoi.

Ni khatma hi Pathen chapate chu acham chama Pakai angsunga ahung kikhopna diu aumin ahung lut kit tauve, chule Satan jong chu ama atahsa tah a Pakai angsunga kilah din amaho lah a hin ahung pang kit’e.

Hichea hin Pakaiyin Satan jah a aseiyin, “Hoilama gache lea nahim?” tia adoh kit leh; Satan jong chun Pakai chu adonbut’in, “Leiset chunga kanung kama kaga lhah-in, chule chung le noi kaga kopton, hichea kona hung kit kahi,” ati kit’in ahi.

Chuphat’in Pakaiyin jong Satan jah a aseipeh-in, “Nangman kalhachapa Job khu iti nagel am, leiset chunga ama tobang mi aumpoi; nolnabeihel le chondih tah ahin, Pathen ging khen cha umjinga, lamse lam peldoh jing mi ahime? Ajeh beiya nangin ama khu suh mang dia nagot’a ama douna thil naboltah vangin, tun jong alung alhadeh hih laiye,” ati.
Hichun Satan jong chun Pakai jah a aseiyin, “Tahsa vun khel’a vun ma ma ahi! Mihem khat’in anei jouse chu ahinkho kihuhna apeh tei tei ding ahi.
Hijongleh nangman nakhut lhangin lang agubuh le aphe avou khu thampeh-in natsah le chun, aman namai chang laitah a nagaosap jeng ding ahibouve,” ati.
Hichun Pakaiyin Satan jah a aseiyin, “Vetan, ama khu nathu thu ahi; amavang ahinkho khu nahoipeh tei tei ding ahi,” atin ahiye.
Hijeh chun Satan chu Pakai angsunga konin akondoh paiyin, Job chu genthei hesoh tah-in abol’in, akengto phanga pat’ in aluchang adeh jang geiyin aongkom beihel’in kidah dah-in aphah sah tai.
Chutah chun Job in jong akikhotna ding bel hal khat akilah-in, akikhot’in, chule achen vutbollah a akibol jenge.
Chuphat’in ajinun Job jah a aseiyin. “Tugeiya jong nangma lung lha louva naum nah lai ding ham? Pathen chu gaosap’in lang thidoh jeng tangem?” atitai.

Ahinla Job chun ajinu jah-a aseipeh in, “Nangman numei ho lah a angol pen khat thusei bangin thu naseiye. Einin Pathen khut’a kona thilpha jeng jeng ikisana, thilse kisan louhel’a ium ding ham?” ati. Thilsoh hijat’a jong hin Job chun akamsung jengin jong chonsetna thu aseipoi.

Job golte pasal thumin hitobang tah a Job chunga thilse hung lhungpi hi ajah doh phat’uvin, ama ama khomun cheh a konin ahung tauve; amaho chu Teman mi Eli’phaz le Shuh mi Bildad toh chule Na’amath mi Zophar ahiuve. Amaho hi ahung kitem toh-uvin. Job chu lhep lung monga lhamon dingin tha khat tah a hung lhun khom din agouvin ahi.

Ahunguva ahileh gamla ahung geipet’u chun Job chu alim amel jong ahedoh thei tapouve; chuphat’in amaho hi hapenin apenguvin akap tauvin ahi. Chujongleh amaho hin aponsil jouseu abottel soh keiyun, alujanguva leivui akithekhum un, van lam aveuvin ahi.

Agol apaite hin Job chu tollhang lah a ni sagi le jan sagi sungin atoupiuvin ahi, khat’a khat jeng chan jong ajah a thu seiya akam keh poh jong aumpouve; ijeh-inem itileh anat genthei behseh chu amahon amusoh keiyu ahi.
Hitobang thilsoh kichai nung hin Job jong akam kan leiset’a ahung pen chu agaosap pan tai.
Hichea Job in asei chu hiti ahi:
“Keima leiset’a kahungpen nikho leh, ‘Chapang pasal khat akijil tai’ tiaAkiseina hiche jan chu Mangthah jeng hen.
Hiche nikho chu muthim khojin ni hihen. Chung Pathen in jong hinbol da jeng hen; Chujongleh hiche nikho hin Khovah jeng jong hung vah da hen.
Hiche nikho chu thop cheh chuh hen lang Muthim lhangkhal thuh-in kiheh let lut hen; Achung lama jong meibol jing let lut in kai hen, Nisa oh-in aval bangin kichat tijat um hen.
Hiche jan chu muthim lhangkhal in lo hen, Kum sunga kipana nikho ho lah a hin pang hih hen; Chule lha min kisimna lah jong Hiche nikho chu pang hih hel hen.
Ahi, hiche jan chu nao kijilna theilou janching hihen. Hiche jan hin kipa ogin kijadoh hih hel hen.
Nikho gaosap themho chun hiche nikho chu gaosap hen, Leviathan phin hang theihon phin hang hen.
Hiche nikho chun ahsite jong ahungso tengleh thim den hen. Avah din kinem hen lang vahla vah data hen; Mihem koima chan jong Jingkah kolmang kikeo mu hih beh hen.
Ajeh chu hiche nikho hin Kanu oisunga anaobu kotpi akhah pon, Keima mitmu dingin jong Gim gentheina asel mang poi.
“Kahungpen lhah a chu ibola kathiden da ham? Naobu sunga kahung vadoh doh a kabeiden leh itam?
Ipi dia katouna ding mi pheichung in einasan a, Ipi dinga kachep ding noi teni anaum ham?
Chutilou hileh keima kijamden a thip del ta ding, Keima lumden a kicholdo jo ta dinga:
Leiset leng ho leh miching jouse, Khogemsa jouse kisah phat theiho chutoh lum khoma,
Sana haotah milen milalte chutoh kijam khoma, Ainsung dangka dipset ho chutoh lumkhom ta ding.
I-atileh keijong lha lhing louva penga mangthah den lou kahim? Chasen khovah mukha louva mangthah den ho banga?
Thikhol khula chun migilouvin gitlou abol tapon, Hikoma chun thachol jouse akicholdo tai.
Hikoma chun songkul lut jouse akilham kangsoh tan, Songkul ngah-pa hutot ogin jong ajapha tapouve.
Mineo milen lhingset’in aumkhom’uvin, Soh jeng jong apupa a konin achamlhat tai.
“Ipi i-atileh gim genthei thoh-pa hi khovah kimusah a, Hin gentheiya hingpa hi hinkho kipeah ham?
Migentheipa hin thi ding adei lheh jengin, Ahinla thi phat ahung lhung poi; Gou le nei kiselguh kihol sangin Thina ding ahol hoi jenge;
Hitobang ho hin lhankhuh aphah tengu leh Tha nom’uva sei theilouva kipah ji hilouvu ham?
Alampi bon kimulou mipa hi Ipi dinga khovah kipe-ah ham? Hoiya chu Pathenin Ama hi akithopi ding hitam?
Ijeh-inem itileh ka-angsunga Kagimna hi neh khop set’in ahung lhungin, Thoh hahsa kathoh jouse hi Twi kisung lha a bang jenge.
Ajeh chu kaginpen thil chu kachunga ahung lhungin, Katijatna pen chun eihinpha tai.
Keima kilha kangin kaumpon, Umjong kaum thim tapoi; Keiman choldona kaneipoi, Gentheina joh ahung jin ahi,” ati.
Hichun Teman mipa Eli’phaz kitipa chun adonbut’in aseitai.
“Mi khaitouvin najah a ikhat khat hinsei leh Nangman na-ngaida ding ham? Hoi hoi hijongleh Koi ham hichea thusei louva um thei ding chu?
Vetan, nangman mi tamtah nahildoh-in, Abantha lhasam jouse jong nahatdoh sah tai.
Akipal lhu jeng dingpa jong Nangma thusei ho jeh hin ading theiyin; Chujongleh akhup kithing thinga pansa det theilou jong Nangman nadindet sah gam tan ahi.
Tun nangma genthei nan nahin phan, Hijeh chun imacha dou thei louvin naume; Hahsatnan nahin sukhan ahileh Nalung athoidel tan ahi.
Pathen nagin pichu nakisonna hilou ham? Chule lung lha louva naum chu kinepna nanei hilou ham?
“Geldoh temin, Themmona bei mihem koipen mangthah kham? Ahilou jongleh hoikom pen tah a Midih kisu mang kha mong am?
Keima het’in vang themmona boldoh a Genthei hesohna ding jeng Muchi kitu hanga kituho jouse hin Hitobang genthei hesohna chu akilo akilo cheh bouve.
Hitobang miho chu Pathenin Ahu alha khum tengleh amangthah jiuvin, Pathen lunghanna ahung deojah tengleh Akavamsoh jiuvin ahi.
Sakei bahkai kitum gin, Kichat umtah sakei bahkai hamgin chu; Sakei bahkai noute jouse Ahau apulsoh gamtan ahi.
Sahing neh ding abeijeh-in Sakei bahkai hat tah jong amangthah jin; Chule sakeipi bahkai jong Anoute jouse akithe cheh soh jitai.
“Kahenga guhthim chan thu khat eikiseipeh-in, Kanabeng hin taohel hel’a aseigin kajai.
Ihmut lan a lunggil jouse manga akilanpet’in, Mihemte athilup’in alum jiuvin ahi;
Hichun kichatnan eiphan kitihot hot’in kaumin, Hijeh chun kagu kachang jouse akithinge.
Hichun kamai ahung kijap dap hoiyin ahileh, Katimul jouse akithousoh tai.
Mi khat ahung dingdet kheh jengin, Kenla amai kamu thei hih hel’e; Kamit te masang kamaiya chun agong aumden nalaiyin, Hichun athipdel’in, keiman ogin khat kahinjai.
‘Thi thei mihem hi Pathen angsunga dih chang mong hina a, Mihem hi Asempa angsunga Thengjou mong ding hinam?
Pathen in alhacha a pang ho jeng jong aging chapon, Avantil ho jeng jong abol khel’u aphoh jie;

Chuti ahileh hiche leiset in dunga cheng ho hi, Ichan geiya khohjo ding hiuva, Neldi leivui chunga abul kiphut ho hi Ichan geiya khohjo ding hiuvam? Hitobang mihem ho hi Nget-eh banga baitah a kinoigoi thei ahiuve.
Jingkah le nilhah kah jengin jong Amaho hi akisumang mang jiuvin; Imacha khohsahna beihel’in Amaho hi atonsot’a din amangthah tauve.
Ajah-uva aponbuh hen nau khombul hi kibot doh leh, Chihna lhahsam jeh a moh thi diu ahi,’ tin aseiye.
Koutemin nadonbut ding mi um nam? Atheng ho koipen henga nakihei mang ding ham?
Mi-ngol chu lung gimin athin, Mi-ngol ten lunghan hi athilo jiuve.
Keiman hi tobang mi-ngol ahung khosah pan kamun, Ahinla ainchunga gaosapna hetman louvin ahung lhunge.
Achapate jong kilongdet det a um ahiuvin, Min kelkot phunga amehgoi jiuvin ahuhdoh ding aumpoi.
Achang at ding jong agilkel hon aneuvin, Achang chu ling le khao lah a aki-at jie; Chutengleh adangchah jousen jong Haihel hol’in agou chu adel’uvin ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh gentheina jong hi Leivui lah a hung kondoh ahipoi; Chujongleh gimna jeng jong hi Tol a hung pengdoh ahideh poi.
Muvanlai chung lama alentou banga Mihem vang hi agenthei dinga peng ahi.
“Kei hivang leng Pathen bou hol ing ting, Kachung chang thu Pathen henga seplhange;
A man thil loupi tah tah abol jin, Hetphah lou lou thil abol jie; Thil kidanga thil kidangla Ajat sim jou lou aboldoh ahitai.
Aman leiset chunga go ajuh sah jin, Loulai dung jousea jong twi alonlhah sah cheh-e;
Min asot lhah ho chu adomsang jin. Alunghem ho jouse chu achoi sang jin ahoidoh-e.
Mi duha thuh ho thilgon jouse asuhnoh peh jin, Hijeh chun akhut’uvin imacha abol molsoh pouve.
Mi kichihsah ho chu amaho chihnan aman jin, Duha thuh tah a athilgon jouseu chu asubei loi jie.
Sun kim lai leh muthim atoh khauvin, Sun laiyin jan muthima kimai bangin akimaile leuve.
Ahivangin Pathenin pabei ho chu Hitobang miho kamhatna a konin ahuhdoh jin, Mi lhasam sate jong chu Mi thahatte khut’a konin achu lhai.
Hijeh chun mivaichan jong kinepna anei nalaiyin, Thu adih a kitan chun migilou kam asimbinge.
“Ven, Pathen in asuhdih jing thei Mihem chu anun nom ahin; Hijeh chun Hat chungnung Pathen in napho chu donlouvin neidan.
Ajeh chu mi mavoa Pathen chun Boljong aboldam jin ahi; Aman mi ajep chah jin, Chutengleh akhut te nin aboldam jie.
Gentheina a kona gupvei jen nahuhdoh ding, Sagivei alhin teng vangleh thilsen napha taponte.
Kel lai jongleh thina a konin navahdoh in tin, Gal lai jongleh chemjam masanga nahuhdoh ding ahi.
Mihem kamin nahouset ding la toh khapon natin, Manthahna a hung teng jongleh nagin lou ding ahi.
Manthahna le kel’in nahin phah teng jong leh Nangman nanuisat mai ding; Leiset chunga gamsa jouse jong hi Nangman nagin louhel ding ahitai.
Ijeh-inem itileh gamlah a song jouse toh nakihou theiya, Gama sahang jouse tojong nakicham ding ahitai.
Naponbuh jong ahoidoh tan ahi, ti nahetdoh a, Nagavet teng nakelngoi hong keh louva uma amang jong um lou ding ahi.
Nangma son nachilhah mite jeng jong Pungjal a tampi hi diu ahi, ti nahetdoh ding ahi; Chule nacha nanaote jeng jong Leiset’a hampa jat pha diu ahi.
Nateh thia nalhankhuh nakijot ding, Aphatcha changphol’a changsi kijap doh nabah ding ahi.
Vetan, keihon hiche thudol hi kakhol chen’uvin Hiche hi hiti mong hi ahinai; Ngai phan lang Naphat chomna din kihet them tan,” ati.
Hichun Job in jong adonbut’in aseipal tai:
“Ohe, kagimna hi kitedoh thei hihen lang, Kanatna jouse hi kilep toh thei hileh!
Hitia chu kibol thei hivangleh Twikhanglen a neldi jat sangin gihjon te; Hichejeh tah a jong hi Kathusei jouse dou thei louva khoh ahitai.
Hat chungnung pa thalpin eidot jet jet’ in, Athalgu jouse kahinkhon kachop chopjenge; Pathen a hung kondoh tijatna jouse chu Keima dou dingin akigolsoh tauve.
Gamlah sangan chun hamhing akimu teng Peng peng ji monga Ahilou jongleh bongchal khun A-an neh khu abutpi pi ji mong am?
Anche tampet put khu Chi solouva neh theiya nabol’uva, Ahilou jongleh Ahtui podal khu Ineh leh alji mong nam?
Hicheng kaneh khah ding khu Kachil jeng jong aputsin pon, Lohso so um hiche ho pi hi Keima anneh dinga um ahiuve.
“Ohe, keima taona kisang ding hihen, Kadei hi Pathen in eipeh ding hileh;
Pathen dia mehgoi din phabep ing ting, Akhut ahinlha jaova eithadoh jeng dingahi.
Chutileh kalung monna joh hin tin, Kanat thohna jong kakichoi sang joh ding ahi. Ipijeh-inem itileh Pathen Thengpa thupeh chu Keiman nahsah mon kabol deh poi.
Keiman hitia hi ka-nga nga jou mong dinghiya, Athinave ve ding ibola lung nenga ka-nga hat ding ham?
Keima thahat hi song banga tahmong hiya, Katahsa jong hi sum-eng lhouva lhou ham?
Keiman dinjou nading thahat jong kanei pon, Kachunga hin kithopina jong ahung kondoh poi.
“Agol apai dia khotona neiloupa chun Pathen Hat chungnung jong aginlou ahitai.
Lhanghoh twi bangin kasopiten adung avaiyin eiheiyun, Chuh lai hohtwi bangin akitol mang loiji tauve.
Muthim twivei lah a buhbang lhang akikhol jin, Hitobang muna hin buhbang alhang lhangin aum jie.
Kholum phat leh akilulah ji pouvin, Nisan akah teng aum nauva konin amangji tauve.
Hiche ho holna dingin kholjin miho akiheidoh uvin, Nelgam thip jenjun a alut’uvin amangthah ji tauve.
Tema a hung kon kholjin mihon ahol leuvin, Sheba khoa hung kon kholjin hon amu di akinem’uve.
Akinep nau chu mohseh ahitan, Amaho chu abeisan amudoh tauve.
Nang ho tua hi kei dia hitobang hi nahiu ahin, Kanatna masepi hi namu’uva ahileh nei kichauve.
Keiman I-khat khat neipeuvin’tia kathum ham? ‘Naneiyu chun khattou sumguh neipeh peh-un,’ katim?
‘Doumah pa khut’a konin neichu lhauvin,’ kati ham? ‘Mi bolgentheite khut’a konin nei chodoh-un,’ katim?
“Adih neiseipeh tau paopoh louvin um naveh tang, Iti kachonkhel ham, phaten neihetsah tau.
Thudih kiseiho hi itobanga thahat hitam! Amavang ipipena nang hon neipho diu ham?
Thu mohsei sei hin mi aphodih theiya nabol’uva, Panna neilou mihem thusei hi hui nung bep hilou ham?
Pabei chagate san vang kisana nakihop diu, Chule nagol napai jong nakijoh-uva sumkan nadel diu ahi.
“Tunvang lung lhaisel’in hungun neiveuvin, Mihem cheh ihiuvin nang ho maiya jou seiponge.
Lungset’in kile kit tauvin kachunga thudih lou bol dauvin, Nung chen keima dihna akiphongdoh hih laiye.
Kakama thudih lou kasei khah mong a? Hamsetna toh kha louva kaum ding ham?
Leiset chunga mihem hin natoh hahsa atoh ding hilou ham? Ahinkho jeng jong hi thalah hinkho bep hilou ham!
Ni kihei ngah jinga um soh natong tobang ahin, Thalah natong atohman ki-nga jing tobang ahi.
Hijeh a chu keima alha lha a kakeova kalup’a, jansim janseh leh gim genthei eikithohsah ahi.
Kalup teng ‘Itih tah leh kajing tho ding ham?’ katin, janla ajanin asot behseh jeng jin, Jingkah kho hungvah lhah kahsen Keila kakipeh peh jeng jin ahiye.
Katichung la than le naiyin atomjol soh tan, Kavun jouse adul chet chut jin ahung jal’in avouthah akimun atolsoh tai.
Kahin nikho jong patphei kilham sangin achaljon, Kinepna beiyin akichai pai ji tai.
“Keima hinkho hi hai khat bou ahi, ti geldoh jingin, Kamit te nia hi kipana kamu kit louhel ding ahitai.
Tua eimu ho mit hin aphajoa eimu kit lou diu ahin, Namit te nia neivet vet pet a beiden ding kahi.
Meilhang akitol tola abeisoh banga, Noimigama kumsuh pa jong hung kaldoh kit lou ding ahi.
Ama chu ainlama jong hung kile kit louhel ding, Achenna in jengin jong ahet khah kit lou ding ahitai.
“Hijeh a chu koima kathip thei lou ding, Hibanga kalhagao genthei pet’a hi thu kasei tei ding ahi; Kahinkho hesoh pet tah a hi Keima kakiphin tei tei ding ahiye.
Kei hi twikhanglen ahiloule ngapi kahiya, Nangin keima neihon hon jeng ding ham?
Kajalkhun a lum leng nom domin tin, Kalupna ahin kanat phadomin te,’ tia kasei teng;
Nangin mangse se neimatsah jin, Mu kidang dang neivetsah jin neitijat sah jie.
Hibang tah a kagu kachangin eichi chi sangin Kalol’a kikhaiya thi ding kanom joi.
Kahinkho jong kakidah-e, hingsot sot taponge; Neilimsah sah hih-in, kahinkho jong hai khat bou ahi.
Mihem hi ija nabola nangin hibanga nagelkhoh ham? Ipi dinga ama hi nagel jingjeng ham?
Ipi dinga-jingkah sim jingkah seh a nahung vil jinga. Phatsim seh a napatep jingjeng ham?
Itih chan geiya neihiti vet vet jeng ding hiya. Kachil geiya kanung val kahsea limsah louva neikoilou ding ham?
Vo mihemte honga pangpa, Chonset kabol leh nang chunga ipi kabol khah ham? Iti mong mong melchih-a neikoiya, Kei hi nangma dinga noh phahsah kahi hitam?
Ipi dinga nangin kasuh khel ngaidam louva neikoiya, Kathemmona suhmang louva nakoi ham? Ajeh chu tua vang leiset’a thia kijam ding kahitan, Nangin neihol jongle chun anaumtaponge.” ati.
Hichun Shuh mi Bildad kitipa chun adonbut’in aseipai tan ahi.
“Itih phat leh ngah dia thu hijat hi nasei sei jenga, Nakamsunga nathuseiho huihat tah banga eoje ju ham?
Pathen in thudih chu akaleh a atun dia nabol’a, Hat chungnung Pathen in adih akaleh a ahei khah am?
Nachate jong achonset’uva ahileh Pathen in achonset jeh-uva asuhmang ahitai.
Nangin jong Pathen nahol’a Hat chungnung Pathen henga nataova ahileh,
Chule atheng nahiya adih nahi mong mong leh Pathen chu achamtah a nang dinpi dia hungdoh ding, Hitobang tah a chu kipaman napeh a Midih nahijeh a na-in kisah phat namuloi ding ahi.
Hichea hi masanga nahao patna chu imachalou hijongleh, Khonunga nahinkho chu haotah mong nahi ding ahi.
“Masang laiya chu itobang mong mong ham khol chenin, Pule paten ipi anamudoh-um ngaiton;
Ajeh chu eiho hi jan hi mibou ihiuvin Imacha ihesoh pouve;
Mihon nangma nahil dauva naseipeh lou diu, Ahet dungjui uva thu tampi naseipeh lou diu ham?
“Leiset phat louna a thelna keh theiya, Twi vei louna a pumpeng pou theiji nam?
Sat lhah louva apahchaa a um pet jengin jong Hamkeh dang sangin agop masa jin ahi.
Pathen sumilte jouse jong chu hitobang chu ahiuvin, Pathen hephaloute kinepna mangthah ding ahi.
Hitobang mi chu akinepna acheh chao jin, Akisonna jong maimom panjang bep ahibouve.
Ainbanga aki-ngaiya ahijongleh angaion jin, Apumtuh thoa dinsah ding agot vangin adou jou poi.
Hampa hoitah nisa noiya akhantou tou abangin, Ahonlei lai dunga hamdong loudong akithingje jui.
Ahinla song lhuh kisesang lah a ajung akivei denin, Hin gentheiyin songpi khikah dunga ahinge.
Aumna muna khun kisumang jeng taleh seilep’intin, ‘Ken nangma kamu khapoi,’ ati ding ahi.
Vetan, amapa kipana chu hitilam hi ahin, Adang vang chu tol’a kona hung pengdoh ding ahiuve.
“Vetan, Pathen in nolnabei mihem chu apaidoh lou ding, Chule migilou jong akithopi lou ding ahi.
Nolnabei nahileh nakam dimset set’a nanuisah ding, Nakam bem bema kipa thu nasei kit ding ahi.
Nangma vetda pang hon jum le ja ponsil’a akisil diu, Migiloute ponbuh jouse jong kisongdoh kit lou ding ahi,” ati.
Hichun Job in jong adonbut’in aseipai tai.
“Hiti chu ahimonge, ti keiman kichentah-in kahei. Hijongleh Pathen anga mihem iti them chang ding ham?
Mihem khat touvin Pathen kinahpi din go leh, Ama chu khatvei donbut seh-a sang khatvei adonbut jou louhel ding ahi.
Alungthimla achingin atha la ahat’in, Koiham ama jumso jou ding mihem chu?
Aman miho hetman louvin mol sang jouse atolmang jin, Alunghan teng jongleh akhup athal’in aleh jiuve.
Aman leiset jengjong ahot lingin Amun muna konin achon mang jie; Chutengleh leiset jeng jong Abul khompi jouse geiyin akilongsoh hel jin ahi.
Nichang jeng jong aphoa ahileh Ahung sohdoh ji tapoi; Ahsite jeng jong hi Mohor anam khumin akhah jin ahi.
Aman van pumpi jong apha jal’in adahjin, Twikhanglen twipi kinong geiyin achotphan athipsah-e.
Ahsi lah a Ngambom uichalle Ngambom, lungthu Bombel jouse jong, lhanggam ahsi jouse jong ama sem ahi;
Aman hetphah hoi hilou thil jouse asemin, Simsen lou datmo kidang thil hijat aseme.
Ven, kakom ahinjot pa vangin kamupoi, Ama la ache che jengin kahedoh hih hel’e.
Adeiya thil khat akilah noma ahileh Koipen hin ama chu ajahda thei ding hiya, Mihem koipen hin ama jah a chu ‘Ipi bol nahim?’ ati thei ding ham?
“Pathen chu alunghan teng ahai kitji poi, Rahab dia natong jouse jong anoiya akithol thol’ui.
Kenjong iti kadonbut’a ama hi kahouva, Kachung chang thu hijat seina dia ipi pi kalhen ding ham?“
Nolnabei himong jong leng Iphatsahna kakihonna thu kasei ding ham? Ajeh chu kakihehpi dingpa chu Thutana pangpa jong hijah ahibouve
Keiman ama kakouva ahileh eihou nai, Hijongleh kasei angaiye, tia katahsan lou ding ahi.
Ajeh chu amatah-in hamthe thua einoi goi jeng ahin. Ajat simjouva katina hijat hi abese se ahibouve.
Aman hainom man louhel’in eilhan, Natna khaveng vungin eitom lhah deh tai.
Thahat’a no ding kiti jongleh Ven, ama hi thahat tah ahibouve. Kihehna kidin tepi ding kiti jong leh Koipen hin ama akoulut jou ding ham?
Themmona bei himong jongleng, Keima kakam hin eithabep ding, Nolnabei mong mong kahi tijong leng Aman mipha lhem bou eiti ding ahi.
Hijongle lah keima nolnabei kahinai, Kei le kei kikhohsahna ima kaneipoi; Kahin hinjeng ding jong hi Kei le kei kakihon kakideipoi.
Aboncha hi tha khat cheh ahin, Hijeh a chu keiman kasei ahi, ‘Nolnabei jong migilou jong Pathen in asuhmang cheh ahi,’ kati.
Hetman louva thina ahung lhun teng leh Aman themmona bei mi hamsetna chu anuisat bep’e.
Leiset hi migiloute khut’a kipedoh ahitan. Hichea jong hi aman ama dia thutana pangte mit atompeh a kho amusah lou ahi; Ama bol ahilouva ahileh Koi dang penin abol ding ham?
“Mi lhai jangkhai tah bangin Kahin nikho akitol tol jengin, Nikho hijat hi akitol tol’uvin Thilpha imacha jong mulouvin aum’uve.
Kahin nikho jouse hi pumpeng kitol mang bang leh Ikhat khat kimat dia hung leng lha muvanlai abange.
Keiman, ‘Kiphin dang ting, Mai lhaisel’in um ing ting, Kalung gimna jouse pailhan Thanom sel’in um tange.’ ti jong leng;
Kathoh genthei ding ho chu kaging masai, Ajeh chu themmona beiya neikoi deh lou ding kahei.
Themmo chang bih bih ding chu Ibola panna beiya kathoh thoh ding ham?
Katahsa katichung hi buhbang twiyin sil ngim ing, Kakhut teni cha-ngel twiyin sop theng jong leng;
Nangin eh-khul sunga neiphum lut tan natin, Kaponsil jeng jong hin eithei nom lou ding ahi.
Ajeh chu Pathen hi mihem tobang ahipon, Chujongleh ama le kei hi Kiheh a kinel theidol kahi lhon poi.
Kei ni kah a thupo lea panga sucham thei, Akhut’a eijep chah lhon a eibol thei lhon aumpoi.
Aman eijepna tenggol kilah mang hen lang, Kichat naumna chu eihoh kichatsah kit hih hen.
Chuteng gin neilouva ama ding kaseiya, Hitobang pia hi kaum kit lou ding ahi.
“Keiman kahinkho hi kadei tapoi, Kanop nop’a kakiphinna thu kasei jeng ding ahi; Hitobanga kahinkho genthei pet’a hi Thu kasei sei jeng ding ahi.
Pathen jah a jong kaseiya Neithemmo sah hih hel’in, Ipi dinga nangin neikinahpi ham Neihil temin, kati ding ahi.
Nangma dinga nakhut semsa keima hi bolgentheiya Donlou dailouva koi jeng ding, Migiloute thilgon kithopi joh kiti hi Thilpha joh a nagel mong hitam?
Nangman jong mihem mit teni tobang hi naneiya, Mihemte thil vet banga hi navet ham?
Nangma hin nikho jong Mihemte hin nikho tobang bang hiya, Nahin kumkho jeng jong hi Mihemte hin kumkho tobang bang ham?
Hitobang tah a nangin kathem mona nahol’a, Kachonset na nakhol khol jengpi hi?
Keima themmona bei kahi jong nahenan, Nangma khut’a kona eihuhdoh ding mi la aum tapoi.
Nakhut teni mong monga neimeh toh toh a Nangman neisemsa kahin, Nahung kile hei kit jenga Neisuh mang ding mong mong hitam?
Nangman leiset hi nalah a neisem chu geldoh-in, Tua jong leivuima ma neiso kit ding hitam?
Nangin bongnoi kilhoh banga neilhoh lhah a, Bongnoi kitungha banga neitunhat hilouham?
Tahsa phe le vuna neitoma ponsila neisil peh ahin, Kagu le kachang jouse napheh mat’a lhin neikhum peh ahi.
Nangman hinkho neipen long louvin neilungset’e; Nami khohsah nan kalhagao ahoidam’e.
Amavang thil hijatpi hi nalungthim a nasel’a, Hiche hi nagel ahi, tivang kenjong kahenai;
Kachonset leh neimelchih keovin, Kathemmona chu moh-in nasuchampoi.
Themmona kaneiya ahileh, ohe, ada kahi; Nolnabei hijong leng kadahdoh ngampoi. Ajeh chu kapum changin kavun atoldoh jengin, Hiche kanat gentheina hi kakivet bep ding ahi.
Kahung dinkang khen khen leh Nangman sakei bahkai bangin neidel’in neichon lhunjie. Chutengleh keima douna mong mongin Thil datmo kidang dang nabol jin ahi.
Keima douna dia kitepna nabol chu nasempha kitjin, Kei chunga nalungsatna nabelap cheh jie; Chutengleh keima dou dingin Hon thah thah nahintollut lut jenge.
“Ipi dinga nangin kei hi naobua kona neihin puidoh ham? Kamit’a kei le kei kakimudoh masang a thidoh hitave leng ong!
Chutileh apeng lou banga uma Naobua kona chu lhankhuh a chelut pai ta dinga!
Keima hinkho hi phat chomcha bou hilou ham? Them khat beh nom kasahna din neidon da tan.
Hung kinung le kit louna gam kajot kah, Lung monmo gam, muthim lhangkhal kihehna gamsung kajot kah chun.
Lung monmona gam, doupi doute kikhanna gam, Khovah kiti jeng jong muthim bang bang ahina gam chu.
Hichea hin Na’amath mi Zophar kitipa chun adonbut’in aseitai:
“Thu hijatpi kisei hi donbut louva um theiya, Amuh le akam dimset thusei mihem hi adih moh chan ding ham?
Hijatpi nasei hin mi amoh jo theiya Namoh sei sei jeng hi naphoh ding beiya nabol em?
Ajeh chu, ‘Kathuhil hi adih-in athenge,’ natin, ‘Keima Pathen mitmun kangime,’
Ahinla hichea hi Pathen in thu asei ding hihen Nahenga hung kamka nahin hou ding hileh,
Pathen in guh thimcha chihna nahil ding ahi! Ajeh chu aman hetkhenna simsen lou anei ahi. Hijeh chun Pathen hin nathem mona sanga baijoa Hitobang bep’a nabol ahi, ti kihet them in.
“Pathena thuh tah a kisel thilguh ho chu Nangman namudoh jou mong ding hina, Pathen Hatchungnung chu akikhonna Nangman naholdoh jou mong ding hinam?
Hichu van chung sanga jong sang jo ahi, Nangman ipi naboljou ding ham? Athuh jong noimigam sanga thuhjo ahi, Ipi nahet phah ding ham?
Adung lam jong leiset pumpi sanga saojo ahin, Alet mong jong twikhanglen sanga lenjo ahi.
Ama chu hung taleh kon atuh tang jouva, Thu tan din go leh kon apho lhah thei ding ham?
Ajeh chu aman pannabei miho jong ahesoh keiyin, Themmona amudoh tengleh don louvin aneipoi.
Hijeh hin lungthim beiho aching jep jep jon, Gamlah a sakol lhem nou jeng jong akivah ngoiye.
Nangma hi lungdih pua hile chun Pathen lam nakhut te nia nasan jeng ding ahi.
Nakhut’a themmona auma ahijongleh paidoh jengin, Naponbuh dunga jong gitlouna umsah hih-in,
Chutileh nolnabeiya mai lhaisel’a nahung dadoh a, Lung monga nauma gin nanei lou ding ahi.
Nangman nagimna sumil paiyin natin, Hohtwi kitolmang bep’a bou nagel ding ahitai.
Nahinkho jeng jong sunlai nisa sanga sanga vahjoa, Muthim jeng jong jingkah khovah tobang ding ahi.
Kinepna lhingset’a nangman lung monna nanei ding, Pathen in nahuh-a mongtah a nachen ding ahi.
Mongtah a nalup’a koiman nahoh kichat lou ding, Mihem tamtah-in nangma lungdei jeng ahol diu ahi.
QMigiloute vang ajet avei avet vetna amit’u khama, Ajamdohna diu lampi aboncha beisoh ding; Chutengleh amaho dinga kinepna pen chu Alaichauva ahaisam diu chubou hi ding ahitai,” ati.
Chujouvin Job chun adonbut paiym aseitai.
“Kinelna beihel’a nang ho hi mipi kiti chu nahiuvin, Chihna jong nang ho toh thitha ding ahi.
Ahinla kenjong nang ho bangin hetna kaneiye, Nang ho sanga lhasam deh kahipoi. Hitobang thil ho kiti hi Kon iti ahetmo beh ding ham?
Kei hi kagol kapaite nuisat bep’a umdoh kahitan ahi, Pathen henga katao chana eidonbut jing ahin, Midih le nolnabei mihem khat kahi me, Gol le pai nuisat bep’in kaumtai.
Anop nop’a um miho din vang Hamset tokha ho hi noise se aum’uvin ahi; Akeng phanga pansa det theilou chu Jep lhu dia kigosa ahiuve.
Gucha michomho ponbuh jouse mongtah-in akisong songin, Pathen phin lunghang ho jong mongtah-in achengui; Hitobang miho hi akhut’uva Asemsau pathen lim kisemthu kichoiho chu ahiuve.
“Nahetbe noma ahileh ganchate kidohin, Chunga leng vachaten jong nahil nauvinte.
Tol’a vah ganhingten jong nahil’uvin tin, Twikhanglena nga jousen jong naseipeh nauvinte.
Ganhing hijat lah a ahephalou khat chabeh um’uva, Pakaiyin akhut tah a abol ahi, ti ahelou um diu ham?
Pakai khut’a ganhing jouse ninkho um cheh ahin, Mihem namkim hinkho jouse jong umsoh keiyah ahi.
Negeiyin anneh atuile a tam atekhah cheh banga Nakhang jong hin thu kiseiho ajah a apatep cheh hilou ham?
Chihna hi upan bou aneiyin, Hetkhenna hi ahingsot pa pan aneiye.
“Pathen in vang chihna thahat aneiyin, Mi thumopna thei leh thil hetkhendol themtah ahi.
Aman asuhmanga asuhsetsa chu Koiman asapha kit thei pon, Aman mihem kotpi akamkhum teng Ahongdoh jouvah aumpoi.
Twinah jouse asinbing teng Twijouse akang sohjin; Twipi chu ahinlhadoh kit’a ahileh Gam leiset achup soh jitauve.
Pathena thahatna le chihna a um jingin, Lhep lhahsa mi leh alhempa agoma ama soh ahilhone:
Gamsunga mi thumop’a pang jong ahomkeovin apui mangin, Thutan vaihomho jengjong angolsah gamtai.
Pathen in lengte konggah khao jong asut lhah peh jin, Akongbuh ataiyuva pontum asuipeh jie.
Thempuho jeng jong ahomkeovin apuimang jin, Mihatte jeng jong akhup athal’in aleh jie.
Chingtah-a thusei miho jong paomon alhan, Upate thil hetkhen theina jong alah mangpeh jie.
Milen milalte chunga noisena aneiyin, Mihatte konggah jong alhap peh jin ahi.
Muthim lhangkhal thuh tah a kikhang jong ahoh doh jin, Khovah laiya jong thimpi ajinsah jin ahi.
Namtin vaipi aloupisah jin, Chule amaho chu asumang jie; Namtin vaipi hijatpi hi akikeh letsah jin, Chutengleh akaimang jin ahi.
Aman gamsunga leiset mite lah a lamkai pipu ho hi Thil ahetkhen thei nau jouse alah mang peh jin, Lampi hilou gamlah hetphah louna gama Lamkai pipu ho hi avathai sah jin ahi.
Khovah beiyin muthim lah a akimai maiyun, Pathen in amaho hi jukham bangin lonle len alhai.
“Ven, thil hijatpi hi kamit te nin amutan, Kanabengin angaiyin ahekhentai.
Nang hon nahet bang banguvin kenjong kahei, Nang ho sanga keima lhasamjo kahideh poi.
Hijeh a chu Hatchungnung Pathen koma thu kaseiya, Pathen henga kachung chang thudol
Nang ho vang hi joule nal’a kilep themle nahiuvin, Nabon chauva pannabei thempu kihisah jeng nahiuve.
O kadeh, mi khattouvin naphoh-u hen thip beh chan umleu chun, Hichu nang ho dinga chihna hipen ding ahiye.
Keiman thu kaseilona ajeh hi ngaiyuvin, Kakam kilehpel’a kataona hi ngai phauvin.
Nang hon Pathen dinga joule nal’a thu naseiyuva, Alhep alhoiya Pathen ding naseipeh diu ham?
Pathen mu dinga langkaina naneiyuva, Ama dinga thu heithemlea napan diu hinam?
Aman nang ho nahinhol tenguleh thilpha soh ding hinam? Mihem in mihem alhep jou banga nalhep jou diu hinam?
Guh thimcha langkaina naneiyuva ahijongleh Thon louhel’a aman naphosal tei tei diu ahibouve.
Alal loupina chun nahoh kichat lou ding hiya, Ama gin nan nahin lhunden lou dingu ham?
Napu napateu thuchih sei jouse jong vutvai kithe bep ahin, Nagalpal jouseu jong leingan kideng bep ahiye.
“Umthim soh keiyun keiman thu seiyinge; Kachunga hung lhung lhung jeng hen.
Kathsa kineh jeng ing ting, Kahinkho toh ngamin kakhut’in kichoi yinge.
Vetan, Pathen in eithadoh jeng ding ahi. Keima kakihol jou deh poi; Hijeng jongleh keiman Amaiya chu Kakihonna thu kakisei tei tei ding ahi.
Chutileh hiche hi kei dia huhhingna hintin, Ama angsunga Pathen hephaloute hung lut lou ding ahi.
Kasei jouse hi lung nachangin ngaiyuvin, Kaseidoh chan hi nakolsunga lutsah cheh-un.
Ven, kachung chang thu seitoh din kagon, Them kachan ding kahenai.
Keima eikinahpi ding chu koi ham? Mi auma ahileh thip beh chan um ing ting thi tange.
Keima hi thil ni seh seh neipen, Chutengleh na-angusunga kisel taponge;
Kachunga konin nakhut ladoh-in neilha kang tan, Kichat naumna chu neihoh tijatsah sah dan.
Chutengleh neihin koutan keiman hou nange; Chule thu neiseisah in lang keima neidonbut’in.
Themmona le chonsetna ijat kaneiyam? Kasuh khel jat le kachonset jat neihetsah tan.
Ipi dinga namai naselmanga, Namelma banga neigel hitam?
Nangman hui mut mangsa thingna nahoh dal’a, Changpol go-sa nadel le le ding ham?
Ajeh chu nangin kei dou nan thilse se najih doh-in, Kakhangdon laiya kathemmona jouse aga neilosah tai.
Nangin kakengphang teni thih khaokol sung nachot lutsah-in. Kakiheina lam lam namelchih keove; Chujongleh nangman Kakengto teni tetohsan nakoiye.
Kei hinkho kiti hi thingmot tobang bep ahin, Ponsil sesa apin aneh chaisa tobang ahitai.
“Numeiya hung pengdoh mihem Ahinkho chomcha bou ahin, gentheina adimset’e.
Mihem hi pahcha pah bangin ahung pahdoh jin, Pahcha gopsuh bangin agopsuh loiji tai; Nisa lim kihei bangin akihei mang jin Kho ngaisot louhel’in amang jie.
Hitobang bep mi hi nangin navet’a. Athu tanpeh dia nahenga napuilut ji ham?
Thilboh lah a thil theng podoh jou koi um am? Koimacha cha aumpoi.
Mihem hinkho hi anikho jat tepsa ahin, Lha ijat hing ding ham, tijong nang koma um ahi; Aval’a ahinlou helna dingin Nangman achan ding tetohsan nakoipeh tai.
Thalah soh banga ahinkho chomcha hi nom asahna din Kihei mangin lang melchih chih datan.
“Ajeh chu thingbul ding jengin jong kinepna aumin, Kiphuh lhu hen lang hileh hung donthah kit ding ahi. Hitia chu thingbul chu Ajunga kona hung dotda kit lou ding ahiye.
Tol’a akungbul chu ap-kai hen lang, Leichunga ajung goden jongleh;
Gotwi lhah tengleh hung noudoh kit’in tin, Thingtoi thah banga ajih don’a abah tampi hung jamdoh ding ahi.
Mihem vang hi a thin, akison nemjie. Mihem ahaisam tengleh hoiya umji hitam?
Dimvei lai twi akan bangin, Vadung twi jong akitol mangin akangji.
Hiti hin mihem jong athin akijam jin, Kinung phoh doh kit louvin aume; Van jouse abeihel kahsea Mihem kithoukit louhel ding ahin, aihmut khanglou ding ahiye.
Nangman noimi gama neisel mang ding hihen, Nalungsat akichai kah a neilhim mang ding hileh; Chutileh phat chom khat neitep peh kit’in natin, Chutengleh neihin kou kit thei ding ahi!
Mihem khat chu athi tengleh Hing kit ding hinam? Anisim aniseh a keima kilhadoh nikho chu Keiman ka-nga jing jeng ding ahi.
Nangman neihin kouleh keiman kahou tei ding, Nangman nakhutsoh keima hi neimu nom kit tei ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh nangman kakalsot jat geiya nasima, Kachonset vang nasim lou ding, namelchih lou ding ahi;
Kasuh khel chengse sakhaova nakhum tup’a, Kathemmo jouse jong nakhujol ding ahitai.
“Molsang jeng jong lhua kitol mang ding, Songpi jong aumna muna kona kilih mang ding ahi.
Twiyin song jouse alhoh mangsoh tan, Vadung twiyin jong leithao jouse alhoh mang tai. Hijeh chun nangman jong Mihem kinepna nasumangin ahi.
Nangman khatvei a-itih geiya din nasumangin, Ama jong achepai paiyin ahi; Nangman amaiso melput nakhelpeh jin. Hiti chun nasol mang pai jin ahi.
Achate atute ama op’a jabol din ahunguvin Amanla ahephapon kho helouvin aumtai; Amaho chu amit amaiyu ajum lheh jengin, Aman hetphah-in anei tapon ahi.
Aman atahsa chunga anat thoh lel seh seh chubou akihet’in, Ama changseh pul akidouvin ahi,” ati.
Hichun Teman mi Eli’phaz kitipa chun adonbut’in aseipai kit tai.
“Miching kitin hitobanga hi lengthet thut’a adonbut ngaiya, Ama le ama niso lam khohui hung nung kibahsah ding ham?
Michingin phachom louhel’a kinel abol’ a, Thilpha abolna thei lou thu asei sei jeng ding ham?
Nang hin Pathen ginna nei talouva, Pathen angsunga ama geldohna nanei lou ahitai.
Themmona nanei jeh a kiphat lama nakam hatlo ahin, Mi duha thuh ho thusei natho ahitai.
Nakam chun nangma bou natha ahin, kei kahipoi; Namuh le nakamin nang douna thu asei ahiye.
“Nang hi mihem lah a apeng masapen a kibol nahim? Mol le lhang hijat sanga jong kisem masa nahim?
Pathen thumop chu na-ngai phat lou hiya, Chihna chu nanga ki-ngaden banga nabolham?
Keiho hi imacha helou kahiuve, ti nangin iti nahet’a, Keiho hetkhen theilou nangin iti nahet khen ham?
Vetan, keiho lah a upa tah tah asam kangsa jong apange, Amaho hi napa sanga jong tahjo cheh ahiuvin ahi.
Pathen in nalhep lung mongna jouse Ehi thil neocha nabol’a, Keihon lung geltah a thu kasei jouseu hi imalouva nabol hitam?
Ipi dinga nalungthim genthei chu nakipoh mang sah a, Ipi dinga lung phamoa mit sat lhap lhap nahim?
Hitobang chun Pathen dou nan lung nagel’in, Hitobang thu hijat hi nakamsunga nason ahi ong?
Mihem hi ija nabol’a athenga um thei ding hiya. Numei sung peng kiti chu adih a um thei ding ham?
Ven, Pathen in Amithengte chunga jong ginchat aneipon. Ama angsunga amit mun van jouse jong athengpoi;
Chuti ahileh hitobang hot le kidah um mihem hi Ichan geiya khohjoa. Themmona twidona don jeng mihem hi I chan geiya khohjo ding ham?
“Ngaiyin keiman nahil inge, Keiman kamuphah chan nahenga phongdoh ing kate;
Michingten anaseisau chu Apu apateuvin jong aselmang deh pouve.
Hitobang miho henga chubou gamsung hi kipesa anahin, Hijeh chun alah-uva jong gamchom mi ahung vahle poi.
Mi giloupa vang ahinkho lhum keiyin nat hesoh thoh-in aumin, Athoh gentheina ding kum jat jong simjou ahipoi.
Anabenga tijat jat um ogin akithong jing jengin, Aphat thei laitah leh mi sumangpan ahindel vuh jie.
Chutengleh muthima kona jamdoh ding akinempon, Chemjam hema lou dinga bou um-ah ahitai.
Neh le chah hol’in gamtina achele len, ‘An neh ding hoiyaba um tam?’ a tile lei; Amanthahna ding nikho chu A hung naitul tul’e, ti aman akihetnai.
Gimna le lung hesohnan timul kithou thouvin alhan, Galmuna pang dia hung lengpa bangin ahung kon’uve.
Aman Pathen douna akhut adop jeh chun, Hatchungnung Pathen seiset dia agot jeh chun,
Kiletsah tah a Pathen dounajeng abol’a, Anung lama kona lum kichoiya ahung jeh chun,
Chujongleh amai jong athaovin achop chet tan, Aphuh dung jong athaovin achen gei gui jenge.
Ahinla ama hi khopi gem lah lah a achengin, Mihem chenna louhel indung jenga achenge; Khopi ho chuleh in jouse achenna ho chu Amangthah dinga bou um cheh ahitauve.
Ama hi hao jong hao tapon tin, Anei jouse jong umsot taponte; Chujongleh leiset chunga hi Aman jung akhoa pansatna anei lou ding ahitai.
Muthim lah a kona jong jamdoh deh lou ding, Ajih hung dondoh jengjong meikongin aleugot ding ahi; Apahcha hung pahdoh jouse jong chu Khopi huiyin alhoh mang ding ahiye.
Ama hi panna beiyin kinepda hen lang. Ama le ama jong kelhem lha hih hen; Ijeh-inem itia ahileh Aman amukit ding chu ahomsa bou ahiye.
Ana nou jouse jong aphat lhin masanga gop soh a, Abah jouse jong ana hung nou kit louhel ding ahi.
Theichang phung kibolna bang banga Aman lengpithei amin loujouse athin lhah a, Olive thing phung kibolna bang banga Apah jouse athin mangsoh ding ahi.
Ajeh chu Pathen hephaloute chu ahomkeo ahiuvin, Nehguh kilahte ponbuh jouse meiyin akavam jin ahi.
Amahon joule nal hi naovop bangin avop’uvin, Chua konin thilse ahingdoh jiuvin ahi; Alungthim sung jouseu jong hi Joulhep ding jeng ngaitoa mah thah ahi.” ati.
Chuphat’in Job jong chun adonbut paiyin aseitai.
“Hitobang thu kisei hi ijatvei kajah hita a, Nabon chauva hi eisulung gimbep’a pang nahiu hitam.
Hamthe thua thu kisei sei jeng hi angahna um ding hina? Ipin nalung himosah a nangin nadonbut kit ham?
Keijong nang ho tobanga chu um nalai hileng Nang ho sei bang banga kasei thei ahi; Nang ho dou nan thu atama tam sei jeng ing ting, Kalu kapei khum khum jeng diu nahi.
Kakam chah leuva ka-um kahsea Nang ho tilkhouna thujeng kasei sei ding ahi.
“Tunvang thu kasei nah vangin kanat kathoh lel’in, Kathoh nah nah vangin ichan geiya hahsa hitam!
Tua vang thilsen eineh chai ahitan, Nangin kagol kapaite neijamsan sah ahitai.
Themmosah dinga hettohsah a pang ding bangin Nangma nahung kipatdoh jengin. Keima maichang laitah a hi Themmo chansah dingin neigotai.
Alunghan pet’in Pathen in eibottel jengin Keima eihotbol tan. Keima douna dingin aha agel gel jengin, Kakidoupin jong keima mitchang sal tenin eivei.
Mihon akamhom dim dimin thu eisei khum’uvin, Nahsah mo tah-in ka-ngeiphe eibeh peh-un ahi; Keima dou ding hin Amaho abonchan a hung kikhom’uve.
Pathen in jong kei hi Pathen hephaloute khut’a eipedoh-in, Mi giloute khut’a eisep lut tai.
Thei nop’a kaum pet’in eileh kadah jengin, Kalol’in eimanin eijep goi jenge; Pathen in vetda avet din Abidoi dingin eitungdoh tai.

Hijeh chun athalpi kap’a them mihon Keima jeng eidoiyun eikap tauve. Voujang nalouvin kajunbuh geiyin adopeh jengin, Khen louhel’in akapsah jenge: Chujongleh kathinkha twi jeng jong Tol’a twi kisung lha bangin asung lhai.
Aman katel kadah-in eijan jengin, Gal-hatpa mibolna bangin eichil thang thange.
Kakihuina din khaodip pon kakikhuiyin, Leivui lah a kamit lhi katheh bepseuve.
Ka ka ka nan kamit kamai asan lhan, Kamitgei jouse jong adup lhan avomsoh tai.
Hiche ahiti vangin kakhut’in thilse kabol pon, Kataona jong athenge.
“Vo leiset, kathisan hi vuh mang hih-in, Ka ka-na jong hi ki-ngahna ding beiyin umsah jon.
Tujengin jong vetan, kei din van a hettohsahna aumin, Eihuh dingpa chu chunga aum nai.
Kagol kapaiten eihouse seuvin, Pathen koma kamit lhi along longe.
Chutileh Pathen in mihem dihna chu Pathen henga aumsah jing thei ding, Mihem khat le khat jeng jong Aheng akoma adihna aum banga um ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh kum phabep jouleh Kahung kile kit louhelna ding gama kache ding ahitai.
Keila ahaisam pai ding kahitan, Kahin nikho jong abeipai ding
Kavel dunga mi dai chavai ding adimset’in, Mi aphin nau hi kamit’a kamoh vetjeng ahitai.
“Keima khel’in nangma hung kitung jengin; Keima dinga kitung ngam ding koi um am?
Nangin amaho hi ima ahetkhen thei louna diuva Alungthim jouseu nakhapeh ahitan, Hichejeh a chu nangman amaho hi Gol najosah a naminthansah louhel ding ahi.
Achaten mitdang chat geova veuva, Agol apaite anei kihoppi dia koupa bang chun,
“Aman mitin vaipi seichah din eiboldoh tan, Hijeh chun min kamaiya chil eiset khum khum tai.
Genthei hesoh a kalhi lon lonjeh-in kamit jong athimtan, Katahsa jong hi nisa lim kitolmang banga abeipai ding ahitai.
Hichea hin midih ho hi atijasoh tauvin, Pathen hepha loute dou nan themmona bei akitil tauve.
Midih vang chu alamlhah adet cheh cheh jengin, Akhut te nia thilse bol loupa chu ahat cheh cheh-e.
Nang ho nabon chauvin hung kile kit’uvin hungun, Nalah-uva keiman miching khatbeh kamudoh lou ding ahi.
Keima hin nikho la abeipai ahitan, Kathilgon jouse jong akichai mai mai ahitai; Kalungthima kadei jouse lah Abeisoh ahitai.
Janlai jong sun lai abahsah jengun, ‘Khovah jong muthim soh vah tante,’ tin asei yui.
Keiman kachenna ka-in din noimigam ve-lhi leng lang, Muthim lah a chun jalkhun kido jong leng,
Lhankhuh jah a ‘Nang hi kapa nahi,’ tin seiying, Than jah a, ‘Nang hi kanu le kasopi numei nahi,’ tijong leng,
Keima kinepna ding hoilam ba hita a, Keima nopna ding kinepna koipen hin amudoh ding ham?
Hiche hi noimigam kelkot gol-ho palkeh a hung kum lha a, Keito kilhona leivui soh cheh diu hinam?” ati.
Hichun Shuh mipa Bildad kitipa chun adonbut’in aseipaitan ahi.
“Nangman itih chan geiya sei ding thu nahol hoi ding hi yam? Phaten geltoh domin keihon jong seiyu vinge.
Ipi dia nangin keiho hi ganchate dan’a neigel’uva, Nangma mitmua gancha ngol kho helou neibahsah-u ham?
Nalunghan pet chun kimalgoi jeng tangem, Nang jeh a leiset hi donlouva umdeh dia nabol em? Nangma jeh a chu Songpi jouse kitolmang jeng dia nagel ham?
“Migiloute meivah kimut mit ding ahin, Meikong jeng jong vah lou ding ahi.
Migilou ponbuh sunga kho athimin, Achunga meivah thaomei kide jong akimut mit tai.
Thagol teh teh a kal ason jongle akal achomtan, Ama thilgon ma man ama hi akipal lhuhsah ahitai.
Ajeh chu lenthang kikamsunga akengphang te nin apuilut’in, Khum kilai sunga alhalut tan ahi.
Thangkol chun akhotaljuma akhit khan, Thang kikam chun akhit det chet tan ahi.
Tol’a chun khaokol akidopeh-in, Lampia thang akikampeh tai.
Jet le veiya konin tijat kichat’in ahinphan, Anung nunga achot chotna ahinchot thupeh tai.
Agilkel’in atha abeipaitan, Akipal lhuhna ding toset aumpaiye.
Atichung avun jouse lah apat’in ajolsoh tan, Thina masapen chun atahsa aval lhum pai ding ahitai.
Kisonna anei ponbuh sunga akimalgoi denin, Tijat umtah lengpa henga ahinpui tauve.
Aponbuh sunga jong ama a hilou hel cheh achengin, Ainchunga min katsong asedimpeh tauve.
Anoilama ajungjouse ahung gop panin, Chunglama abah jouse jong agosoh tai.
Leiset chunga min ama asumil soh deh deh tan, Kholai dunga jong ama min akiphapoh tapoi.
Ama chu khovah a kona muthima kileh lut ahitan, Vannoiya kona kidelmang ahitai.
Amite lah a jong son le pah aneipon, Ama chennaa cheng ding achilhah ahingdoh abeihel’e.
Nilhum lam gam miten ama hinkho hi atijat piuvin, Niso lam gam mite jong akihot lhul soh tauve.
Tahbeh mongin Pathen hephaloute chu Achenna ain jouseu chuti chu ahin, Pathen heloupa inmun loumun jeng jong Hitobang mong mong chu ahiye,” ati.
Chuphat’in Job jong chun adonbut kit’in aseitan ahi.
“Nang hon hitobanga hi neibol genthei thei jeng diu hiya, Sei seiya seithang deh ding neigot’u hitam?
Hitobang hin somveijen neiphoh tauvin, Adih louva neibol’u hi najah-u chalou ham?
Ijemtin suhkhel nei mong jong leng, Kasuh khel chu keiya bou ahi.
Tahmong monga kei douna nang ho nakichoi sanguva, Keima genthei thoh hi kei douna nelkalna namanuva ahileh,
Pathen in bou mo eipeh ahi, nahet diu, Aman athangkol sunga ei-oden sah ahi, ti nahet diu ahi.
Ven, ‘Pumphat’a thil kibol!’ tia kapenjah jah vangin, Koimachan eidonbut tapoi; Othong jejun keiman kakou koujengin, Adih a thu kitanna jong aumdeh poi.
Aman kalampia pal akaitan soh tan, Keima kachepai thei tapoi; Chujongleh aman keima lampi dunga Kho ajinsah-in mu athimsah tai.
Aman kaloupina chengse ahoh lhan, Kalua lal lukhuh alamang tai.
Jet le veiya kapal jouse ahintum keh tan Keima pang jou louva abeipai ding kahitai; Keima kinepna jeng jong chu Thing na-lha bangin ana-lhah sah tai.
Kei chunga alungsatna ahung deojah jengin, Kei hi akidoupin eisemdoh tai.
Asepaite abonchan ahung kikhomsoh keiyun, Keima dou nan galpal ahinkaiyuve; Chule sepaite chun Keima ponbuh kimsoh-in ngahmun asemun atoutauve.
“Kakoma konin kasopi pasal jouse gamla tah a adeljamin, Kakihetpi chengsen jong hetphah louva eikoiyu ahitai.
Ka-inkote leh kagol ngaitah tah ho Kakoma konin ajam mangsoh tauvin;
Ka-ina hung lhungji maljin jousen jong Keima eisumil soh hel tauve. Kasoh numeihon jong hetphahlou bol’in eibol’un, Amitmu’uvin maljin kasoh tai.
Kasoh pasalpa kakouva ahivangin aman jong eihou poi. Kamdama ahenga katao ding angaiye.
Kajinu jengin jong kakamsung-ui adoujou tapon, Nusung khat kapenpi kasopi pasal ho din jong lohso so ka-umtai.
Chapang neocha cha hon jong nahsah mon eibol’uvin, Kakipatdoh tih tih kei douna jeng aseiyui.
Kagol ngaitah tah hon jong eikidah soh tan, Ka-ngaitah tah hon jong eidou tauve.
Kagu kachang jouse leh kavun, katahsa akikamat’in atah denin, Kagu jouse ha kiheh lhong bangin alhongsoh tai.
Nang ho kagol kapaiho, Nei voujang nat piuvin, nei voujang nat piuvin! Ijeh-inem itileh Pathen in akhut’a eitham khahjoh ahibouve!
Ipi dinga Pathen in eibolna banga Nang hon jong suh lhah dia neigot’u ham? Hitobang tah a keima tahsa genthei hi Nang ho dinga nalungnau chimlou lai ham?
“Ohe, kathusei jouse hi kijih soh ding hihen lang, O kaden, aboncha kasei chengse hi lekhabua kisun lut soh kei ding hileh!
Ohe, aboncha hi songpi chung khat’a Thih-hema kijih pol soh keiya Anunga chu amanna lou dia Louvoma kiloivom soh hel ding hileh!
Ajeh chu keiman Eilhatdampu ahinge, ti kahen. Akhonna leh leiset chunga hung pansa ding ahi.
Hitobang hin katahsa vun tol lha jong leh. Kavun beiya katahsa keova jong Pathen kamu ding ahi.
Pathen chu kakomcha kamu ding, Kamit te nin thildang velouva amabou avet ding ahi. Hiche ahina ding hin Kalungthim hin angah lei lheh jeng tai!
Ijemtia nang hon, ‘Iti ama inung del diu ham! Asung thubul hi ama chunga akimui,’ tin, sei jongleu chun.
Nang ho dinga chemjam hemhat kipan chu ginguvin, Ajeh chu lungsatna hin chemjam apat’a talen apeh ahi; Chutengleh nang hon jong Thutan aum monge, ti nahetna diuva chutiah ahi,” ati.
Chutah chun Na’amath mi Zophar kitipa chun adonbut paiyin aseitai.
“Hichea hin kalung ngaito hoa hi donbut ding kadeiye, Ajeh chu keiman kathoh jou tapoi.
Hitobang tah a ki-engkalna ho hi kadou thei him him pon, Kahetdol’a donbut din kalungthim athanom lheh-e.
Nangman nahetlou ham, Semtila mihem leiset chunga akichensah a pat’in;
Migiloute kichoi sangna hi phat chomcha ding bou ahin, Pathen hephaloute kipanajong chomkah a ding bou ahi, kiti hi?
Asandan adungin van mun jouse phajong leh, Aluvum chun meilhang lah noljeng jong leh;
Amajong chu a-eh kideng cheh banga mang hel ding, Amupha chanin, ‘Hoiya um tam?’ ati diu ahi.
Ama chu mang banga mah thah den ding, Kimudoh kit lou ding ahi; Jan manga thil kimu banga Leng mang bel ding ahibouve.
Ama mukhasa jong chun anungmu kit louhel ding, Achenna munin jong ahet’a amuphah kit lou ding ahitai.
Achaten mivaichate henga thil akithum diu, Akhut tah a ahaona jouse anungpeh ding ahi.
Agu achang jouse jong khangdong lai gu le chang tobang ahin, Hijongleh leivui lah a kijamthang bep ding ahi.
“Akamsungin gitlouna thu lhumkei keiyin sei hen, Aman seilep le le jong leh,
Seidoh ding dahel hen lang Immang le le jong leh,
Agilpi sunga aneh achah jouse sesohintin, Gulse gu banga asunga hung sesoh ding ahi.
Aman neile gou jouse abahgam ahin, Aboncha chu ahinloh lhahsoh hel dingahi; Aboncha chu Pathen in jong A-oisunga kona ahin khodoh peh ding ahi.
Aman gulse gu akichep khah a, Gulsum chun achuh lih hel ding ahi.
Khoiju le bongnoiya long Vadung amukhah kit louhel ding ahi.
Aman achol mana tohga aboncha anungpeh a, Aboncha aval lhumsoh lou ding; Akiveina a kona hung kandoh jong Aman nopsahna anei louhel ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh aman vaichate amehgoiyin donlouvin akoiye, Aman asah louhel in khat mohseh-in akilah-in ahi.
“Lung nachim louhel’a thil adeichat chat jeh-in, Akipapi thil khatcha jong akikoidoh lou ding ahi.
Aman aneh moh khen louhel’in anabol jin, Hijeh a chu ahaona hi umsot louhel ding ahi.
Nengtah a aumpet lhingset’a aumpet’a Vaichat nan ahintu pai ding, Genthei hesohna tin cheng Achunga hung lhung ding ahi.
A-oivaset’a akipom dinga Pathen in alungsatna nasa tah asunga akhuma, Alungsat chu gojuh banga Achunga ajuhsah ding ahi.
Chemhem masanga jammang jongleh Sum-eng thalchang in akap pai ding ahi.
Thalchang kikap chu atungtun lama hungdoh a, Athinkha laitah ajot paiya vanghel ding ahi. Chutah leh ama chunga chu Kichat tijat jouse hung lhung ding ahi.
Khojin muthim in ama angah jingin, Mihemin adetkou hilou meiyin akahvam ding ahi. Ipi pi hijeng jongleh aponbuh a adalhah jouse chu Meiyin akahvam hel ding ahi.
Athemmona chengse Van mun jousen aphondoh a, Leiset jong ama douva hung pang ding ahi.
Insunga anei athilkeo aboncha Huipin alhoh mangsoh hel ding, Pathen lungsat nikho chuleh Aboncha kitolmang soh kei ding ahi.
Migilouvin Pathena kona amu ding chu Hitobang thil hi ahin, Ama chan dinga Pathen in atepsa chu Hitobang hi ahiye,” ati.
Chuphat’in Job in jong adonbut pai kit’in aseitai.
“Kathusei ho hi phatechan ngaiphauvin, Hiche hi kilhamon nan manguvin.
Thoh tun tun tadiuvin, Keiman thu seiyinge; Keiman thu kasei jou tengleh Atot nom nom tot nauvin nate.
Keiman mihem douna thu kaseiya nabol’uvam? Iti umthim thei louva ka-umda ding ham?
Nei veuvin, natiu jacheh ding ahi; Hijeh chun nakam kisip cheh-uvin.
Hiche hi kagel teng kalung athoiyin, Katahsa hi akiphedeh jin ahi.
Ipi dinga migiloute hi hing hing theiya, Tehjong teh thia thanei tah a pangu ham?
Amitmu mu’uvin achateu jong acheng theiyin, Amaho mitmu mong mongin achateu akhangtou touve.
A-in jouseu jong imacha atipon. Achunguva Pathen lungsatna mol achukha poi.
Ajangmat phat’in abongchal’uvin ajangmat jingin, Abongpi jouseuvin nou anei jingin anou adalhapoi.
Achateu jong kelngoi hon bangin akijotsah-uvin. Achateu chu alam lam jenguvin ahi.
Chapang ho chu khutbeh kibeng le semjang ginin alamun. Theile kimut ginin akipah thanom’uve.
Hao neng jeng jungin ahinguvin. Nomtah tah-in noimigama akumsuhuve.
Amaho hin Pathen jah a jong ‘Kakom’uva konin potdoh jengin.’ atiuvin; ‘Keihon nangma chondan lampi jouse Het dingin jong kadeipouve.’ atiuve.
‘Hatchungnung kitipa hi ipi beh hiya Keiho amu kinbol alhacha kapan diu ham? Ama henga chu kataovuva ahileh Ipi kaphatchompi diu ham?’ atiuve.
Vetan, amaho hin akhut’uva ahamphatnau akichoiyu hi lou ham? Migiloute thumopna chu kei dia gamla tah ahibouve.
“Migiloute thaomei vah akimut mit jing imu’uva, Achunguva ahamsetnau hung lhung jing imu’u hilou ham? Ama haona aphatna chengse Pathen lungsat chun asuhmang hilou ham?
Amaho hi khohui masanga changpol kikoi tobang ahiuvin, Huile gon alhoh mang changsi tobang ahiuve.
Nangman, ‘Amaho themmona jouse hi Pathen in achateu din akholpeh-e.’ natin; Amahon ahetdoh theina diuvin Pathen in amaho ma ma lethuh jo hen.
Amit te nin amanthahna chu vemong mong hen lang, Hatchungnung Pathen lungsatna twi donin don jeng hen.
Ajeh chu athi nung leh ibola ain akhohsah a Ahinna ding alha jat abei leng i-alona ding ham?
Mi chungvum vuma kikhangdoh ho thu jong atan hesa saa, Koipen hin Pathen chu hetna ahil thei ding ham?
Mihem khat chu anei anga neng jeng jungin Lung mong le nomsa tah-in aumin chuteng athi;
Atahsa jong athaovin akhel dung jong agap chet chut jenge, Agubuh dunga alhin ho jong akang hih laiye.
Michom khatma chu hin genthei hesoh in ahingin athi, Thilpha kiti him him tep kha louhel in aumin ahi.
Akoi hileh leivuiya akijam lhonin, Anilhon in than ten achup soh lhontan ahi.
“Ven, ken nang ho lung ngaito kahenai, Keima adih louva bol dia neigot’u jong kahei.
Ijeh-inem itileh nang hon naseiyun. ‘Milen milalpa in chu hoiba hitam?’ natiuve; ‘Migiloute chenna ponbuh jong chu Hoilamba hitam?’ natiuvin ahi.
Lampia hung kijot ho khu nadoh khah louvu hiya, Amahon naseipeh-u chu natahsan louvu ham?
Migiloupa-chu hamset nin akihing hoiyin, Pathen lungsat ninjong akihuhdoh-e, atiu chu?
Amaikoh tah a alampi phondoh peh ding koi hiya, Abolsa thil jeh a lethuh ding koi ham?
Ama chu alhankhuh lama akiput tengleh, Mihon alhan angah jiuvin ahi.
Ama dingin phaicham dunga chal-eh ho jong alhumin, Ama nunga mihonpi akijot’uvin akitol tauve; Chule amasanga kijot ho jong Abonchan simsen lou ahiuve.
Chuti ahileh nang hon iti keima hi Thu homkeova neilhamon thei diu ham? Neidonbut nauva hin imacha dang aumpoi, Joule nal kihal khopset bou ahi.” atitai.
Hichun Teman mi Eli’phaz kitipa chun adonbut’in aseipaitai.
“Pathen dinga mihem hi phachom ding hinam” Miching jeng jong ama ding bep’a phachom ahi.
Nang hin dihna naneiya ahileh Hatchungnung Pathen dia phachom am? Chujongleh nangman nalamjot jouse nolnabeiya nakoileh Pathen dinga phatchomna um mong hinam?
Nangma nakitah a ahileh Pathenin talen napeh ding hiya. Houva lung lut mi nahileh Nachung chang thu atan ding ham?
Nagitlouna len behseh jeng hilou
Ajeh chu nangin ija pang lou ding Thil kitungdohsa chu nasopite koma namin nalan, Amaho chu nachom gamsit set’in Ponsil louvin akeovin nalhatsah tai.
Athachol adang chah la don ding twi napepon, Agilkelte la an neh ding napepoi.
Mi vaichapa gamsung nasuhneo peh peh-in, Ama chenna muna chu laltouna kido din nagoi.
Nahenga hung meithaiho la imacha napepon nasol mangtan, Pabeiya umte banjang naheboh peh gamtai.
Hijeh chun najet naveiya kipalna ding thang jeng akikamin, Kichat tijatnan hetman louva nalonvuh jing ahi;
Khovah jong athimsah tan, Hijeh chun nangin kho namu thei tapoi; Chutengleh twisoh kinong chun Nangma nalenkhup’in navuh nal tai.
“Pathen chu Van mun jousea cheng hilou ham? Chungsang pen a um ahsite khu
Nangin jong naseiyin, ‘Iti Pathen in thil ahet theiya, Muthim lhangkhal thuh tah a kona thua tan thei ham?
Meilhang jinglei loiya kiheh a tomchah khehjenga Imacha chabon muthei louhel khu, Van mong kimvel dunga khun Pathen chu avahle le bouvin,’ nati.
Nangin masang laiya migiloute lamlhah Hiche lamlui chu najot jing nah lai ding ham?
Amaho chu athi phat’u alhin masangin Thi nan a val lhumsoh jitauvin, Apansat nau a-inmun jouseu jong Twijin alhoh mangji tai.
Amaho hin Pathen jah a jong aseiyun, ‘Kakom’uva konin potdoh loiyin,’ atiuvin; ‘Keiho dia Hatchungnung Pathen in ipi abol jou ding ham?’ atiuve.
Ahinla Pathen amatah chun Amaho insung jouse jong hi thilpha adimset ahin, Hijongleh hiche migiloute hinHiche Pathen hi alung gel’uva alutsah pouve.
Migiloute manthahna amu tengu leh, Midih chengse akipah thanom jiuve; Themmona beihel miho jong chun Ahouseuvin amaho chu anuisat’uve.
Hitin aseiyun, ‘Ikidoupiteu hi akisubei mong mong ahitan. Amaho dalhah chengse jong khu meiyin akavamtai,’ atiuve.
“Pathento kichamin lung mongin umin, Chutengleh nang dia thilpha hung lhung ding ahi.
Pathen in nahilna akamsung soh thu chu kisanin, Athusei jouse chu nalungthima ching jingin.
Hatchungnung Pathen henga nahung kile kit’ a, Chuteng nang le nang naki-ngaitoma ahileh; Adih lou jouse chu naponbuh dunga kona Gamla tah a natolmanga,
Sana jeng jong leivui banga nagel’a, Ophir sana geiya phaicham songhum banga nagel theiya,
Hatchungnung Pathen chu Nangma ding sana deiya nadeiya, Nadeitah dangka banga Nagel theiya ahileh;
Chuteng nangma hiche Hatchungnung Pathena hi Nakipa thanop thei ding ahin, Nadadoh a Pathen lam Namai na-ngat’a navet ngam ding ahi.
Chujongleh Pathen henga chu nataova, Aman nahin hou teitei ding ahi; Hicheteng chuleh nangmanjong Kitepna nabol ding ahi.
Nangin thil khat kilhenin natin, Athil chu nang dia kiphutdet ding ahi; Chutengleh nangma chunga Kho hungvah ding ahitan, nalampi jouse asalvah ding ahi.
Ajeh chu Pathen in mi kiletsahte asunem jin, Mi kineosahte chu ahuhhing jie.
Pathen in themmona neilou mihem chu ahuhdoh jin, Nakhut te nia thilse bol lou nahileh nangjong nahuhdoh ding ahi,” ati.
Chuphat in Job chun adonbut’in hitin aseitai.
“Tuni tah-in kanat akhoh cheh cheh jengin, Hibanga kilel’a kachunga aban-gol hat tah-in alange.
Pathen koma valutje kahet hipou pou leh, Alaltouna phung jenga jong kavalut jeng ding ahi!
Akoma kathu hi kapoh lut jenga, Kakam bem bema kanel ding ahi.
Hichea chu aman adonbutna jouse kahetdoh a, Ama jah a asei ding jouse kahetchet ding ahi.
Aman athanei jousea chu keima einel mong ding ham? Chutilouva kathu angaijoh ding ahibouve.
Midih khat toh kihou ahi, ti ahetdoh ding, Kathutan a pangpan atonsot geiya dia them eichansah ding ahi.
“Vetan, niso lama kache vangin kamudeh pon, Nilhum lama kache jongleh kamudeh poi;
Sahlam kahol’a ahivangin akimudoh joupon, Lhang gam kagakhol kit vangin kamuthei deh poi.
Ahinla aman keima kalsonna jouse ahejingin, Eipatep jeng hen, sana banga jolsela kahung hindoh ding ahinai.
Akhoni chot chotna kachot peh-in, Ama nung alampi jenga kachen kavah mang poi.
Akamsung thupeh khat chajong dalhah kaneipon, Akamsung soh athusei abonchan kalung sunga kavop jing jenge.
Amavang chun seichetna aneiteng kon aseilep thei ding ham? Ipi hijongleh aman agon gon chu aboldoh jeng ahi.
Hijeh a chu keidia agon jong chu amolso tei ding ahi; Hitobang thil tampi hi alunggila cheng jing ahi.
Hijeh a hi ama angsunga hibanga kicha kahin, Kagel phat leh kakicha behseh jenge.
Pathen in kalungthim alhah lhop sah tan, Hatchungnung Pathen in tija behseh in eikoitai.
Ijeh-inem itileh akoma konin khon eithim denin, Muthim lhangkhal’in kamai aselmang tai.
“Ipi dinga Hatchungnung Pathen in thutan phat ding anitda a, chule ama hejinga atahsanten ipi ding monga Ama nikho amukhah louhel ham?
Migilouten gamgi tho jouse aphe lhauvin, Kelngoihon akiguh manguvin akivah tauve.
Migilouten pabeiya um chagate sangan adelmangun, Meithaite bongchal chu thilman din atunsah tauve.
Mivaichate chu lampama asonlhauvin, Gamsunga mivaichate akisel mang soh tauve.
Vaichate chu gamlah sakol lhemho bangin Vetan achateu neh ding hol’in akijot leuvin, Gammang lah lah a chun An neh ding hol in avah leuvin ahi.
Amaho hin loujaova neh le chah akihol uva. Migiloupa lengpilei alho ngimpeh jiu ahi.
Jan khovah vah-in ponbeiyin akijam’uvin. Phalbi dap lah a sil’a kikhu ding pon aneipouve.
Molsanga kona hungjua gotwi akotsoh tauvin. Kiselna ding helouvin songpi phung abeltauve
Mi angsunga pabei chasen gumang mang mi aum’uvin, Mivaichate ponchol jong thilman a tun din alahpeh tauve.
Vaichate chu ponsil beiyin akeovin avah leuvin, Kel thoh pum pumin changphal lhohin apanguve.
Vaichaten migiloute Olive thingdong hoa konin Thaotwi achillha lhauvin. Lengpithei chilna lengpitwi achil vanguvin Amaho dangchah thoh-in aumuvin ahi.
Khopi sunga konin mi alaichat chat’in akipeh-in, Mapua peng peng hon genthei tah-in kithopi akou kouvui; Ahivangin Pathen in hitobang miho hi Ataonau imachan agelpeh poi.
“Khovah douva mi aum’uvin ahi; Amaho hi khovah chutoh kihou theilou ahiuvin. Khovah lampi dung jenga jong Hitobang miho hi avahle pouve.
Muthim lah a tolthat ho achungsoh uvin, Vaichate leh lengvaite tha din agouve. Hitohang mihem chu Jan tengleh guchan apang jin ahi.
Numei jonpi pipan khojin kungbul le mi kimah avekeuvin, ‘Koiman amit’in jong eimuponte.’ tin aseiye; Chujongleh amapa hin Amai achombeh-in akisemin akilep’e.
Hitobang miho chu khojin teng In jousea avah leuvin. Sun tengleh kot akikam khum’uvin. Khovah itobang ham, ti ahepouve.
Ajeh chu amaho dia muthim lhangkhal lai jengjong hi Jingkah khovah tobang ahin. Muthim lhangkhal lah a kichat tijat um tah tah ho toh Amaho kijol’uva gol khat’a um ahitauve.
“Ama chu hetman louvin twichunga akitol mangin, Leiset’a migiloute chan ding chu gaosap chan ding hi ahi; Lengpithei chil’a pang ding Mihem khatcha jong ahenguva ahungpoi.
Buhbang twi jouse chu huile nisan alhoh mangin, Chonset bolte jong noimigam in hitia chu abolji ahi.
Khosunga kholai veng ningkoi lai jousen ahepha pouvin. Amin u jong min ageldoh tapoi; Hitobang tah hin migiloute chu Thing kiheh bong bangin akiheh bongtauve.
“Cha hinglou numei ching jong kivah nan aneiyun, Meithai jong thilpha abolpeh pouve.
Ahivangin Pathen in mihatpa jong Ama thanei nan ahinkho asaosah cheh-in, Thi dinga akigel tengu jongleh Ahung kithou thei kit’uve.
Pathen in amaho hi lungmonna apen, Hijeh chun amaho phatah-in ahui; Amaho hi acheuva alamlhah jouseu jong Pathen in phatechan avetpeh dim dem’e.
Amaho vang hi chomkhat dia kichoi sang ahiuvin, Chujou tengleh abeipai ji tauve; Pahcha pul’in apul jiuvin, Changpal kisih tan bangin atanji tauve.
Hitobang hi ahiya ahileh Kei hi jousei kahi, ti kon asei ngam dinghiya. Kathusei jousea hin imacha abeh poi, Tia koipen hin avetsah jou ding ham?” ati.
Hichun Shuh mi Bildad kitipan adonbut’in aseitai.
“Ginna le leng vai neina hi Pathena ahin, Chung van-gama jong aman cham alensah-e.
Pathen sepaite chu kisimjou ding hinam? Koiham akoma kona jamdoh jou ding?
Chuti ahileh Pathen maiya koi dihjou dinghiya. Numei sunga peng mihem koi hi, boh beh louva um ding ham?
Vetan, Pathen mitmun lha jong avah chenpon, Ahsite jong avah thengpoi.
Chuti ahileh thanjang bep mihem hi, Ichan geiya lhasamjo ding hiya, Hiche lungtol tobang mihem chapa hi Ichan geiya lhasamjo ding hitam!” ati.
Chuphat’in Job chun adonbut’in aseitat.
“Athabeiya chu nangin iti nakithopi hiya. Abanjang ngoisa chu iti nahuhhing ham?
Chihna neilou mi chu nangin iti nathumop’a, Ahenga hetna lhingset iti naphondoh peh ding ham?
Koipen panpia nangin thu naseiya, Nasunga nahinna Hu chu koiya ham?
Lei noiya twito jouse akithingin, Twipi le asunga cheng jouse akichauve.
Pathen maiya noimigam jong akeovin aumin, Kokhuh tobei jong chu asin beiya kihong jing ahi.
Aman onghom laiya sahlam gamkai ahin khangdoh jengin, Leiset jeng jong atunna beiya akhai tho ahi.
Pathen in twipi hi meilhangin ajeldoh jin, Aki-ngapna meibol jeng jong apohjal hih-e.
Aman lha jeng jong amai atomjol’in, Meilhang abolkhumsah-in ahi.
Pathen in twipi maiya velkol ajel’in, Khovah le khojin kah a akilhunsah-e.
Pathen in apho tengleh Van douna khompi jouse akithing jin aleng cheh jiuve.
Aman athahat’in twikhanglen aphoh thip’in, Thil ahetkhen thei dungjuiyin kiletsahte ajep lhui.
Hui anunsah-in van munjouse asemhoh sah jin jolsel’in alhan, Akhut’in guIpi kithol janglai athilpaiye.
Ven, hijat ahivangin ama chonna themcha apodal bou ahin, Achung thudol hi eihon husa themchabou ijauve. Ahinla Pathen thahat kiphonna vanpi kinim khu Kon ahetphah jou ding hitam!” ati.
Job chun athusei ban ahoulim ajop pai kit’in asei kit tai.
“Hing jing Pathen mina kasei ahi. Mo eichan jong Ama ahin, Hatchungnung Pathen in Hin gentheiya eihinsah ahi;
Kasunga haitheina hu aum laisen. Pathen haitheina hu chu kanah hom tenia ache jinge;
Kakama jong thujou kasei louhel ding, Lhepna thu seina dia jong kalei kalelou ding ahi.
Itih hijongleh nang ho nadih nauve kati louhel ding, Kathi kahsea kadinna kakhel louhel ding ahi.
Keima kadihna dingden jing kahin, Iti jongleh kalhaso louhel ding ahi; Kahin laisen jong Kalungthim hin mo eichan khapoi.
“Kakidoupi chu bolmo bolkha tobang hihen, Keima douva pang jouse themmo chang cheh hen.
Ajeh chu Pathen in asuh bei tengleh Pathen hephalou ipia kinem ding ham? Pathen in ahinkho alah mang teng Ipi akineppi ding hitam?
Genthei nan ahinlhun khum tengleh Pathen in ataona angaipeh ding hi nam?
Ama Hatchungnung Pathena kipah ding hinai, Phat jousea Pathen henga tao jing ding hinam?
Pathen thahat thilbol thei chu Keiman nang ho naseipeh unge; Hatchungnung Pathen koma ipi um ham, Keiman imacha selguh kanei louhel ding ahi.
Ven, nang hon nabonchan namusoh tauve; Ipi dinga hitia hi pannabeiya umsoh nahiu hitam?
“Migiloupa chan ding chu hiti hi ahi, Pathena amu ding; Mi bolgentheiya pangten Hatchungnung Pathena amu diu chu hitobang hi ahiye.
Achate anaote pung lheh jeng jongleh Aboncha chemjam hema lou ding bep ahiuvin; Ason apah jousen jong Kivahna kham anneh anei joulou diu ahi.
Ama thi nungleh ahing nalaiho chu gamna hisen athaa avui diu, Ajiteu meithaihon jong aka manlou diu ahi.
Aman dangka leivui jat kholdoh hen alhuh lhuh-in se jongleh, Ponsil hoitah tah leiset leivui jat akholdoh vanga,
Alhuh lhuh-a vang asetdoh ding ahinan, Ahinla midih-in akisil’a changden ding ahi; Dangka akholdoh jouse jong chu Themmona neilou miho kihom diu ahiye.
In akisah jong chu mompan kaibep ahin, Lou-ngah a pang pan lhambuh akisonbep ahibouve.
Mihao tah a jalkhun akijot’a lum ahin, Ahinla hitia chu abol kit lou ding ahibouve; Ahung khahloa ahung hadoh teng Anei agou abonchan abeisoh tai.
Sun laiyin tijat kichat nan twisoh bangin aphan, Jan tengleh chimpeiyin apei mangtai.
Niso lam khohuiyin apokangin ama akitolmang tan, Khohui chun ain-muna konin apomangtai.
Dipdamna neilouvin huiyin alhoh tan, Huihat masanga ama jong akhup athal’in akileh jengin aleng mangtai.
Hichun akhut abeh khum khumin, Adinna muna konin aphiset khum khumjenge.
“Dangka kilaidohna khul jong aumin,
Thih hi leiset’a kona kiladoh ahin, Songpia kona dah kisemdoh ahi.
Mihemten munthima anga ji tan, Akikhonna geiyin aholdoh peh jin ahi; Songpi sung thimlet lut le Muthim lhangkhal kihehna geiyin ahol’e.
Leiko avut’uvin noilam Mihem kithahna louhel phaicham ageitauve; Leichunga kijotle kholjin mihon asumil’uvin, Amaho la mihemtea konin akikhai mangun akinungloi akimachop’-uve.
Leiset vang hi, hichea kona anneh kimu ahin, Anoilama meikongin aleugotsa ahibouve.
Hichea kon hin song mantam sapphire jong akimun, Sana jong leivui jat aphai.
“Chunga leng hing nea pang mulaovin jong. Ahet khah loulai lampi khat akilhungin, Muthong jengin jong amit’a Amu khah loulai hel ahiye.
Gamsa minthang thangin jong ajot khah loulai lampi ahin, Sakei bahkaiyin jong a jot khah loulai ahi.
“Mihemin hitobang songpi ngunsong lah hi Akhut mong mongin aphet phet jin, Molsang lai laijong Abul jouse akalkangin alehkhup jie.
Songpi ho lah a hin twilam asem semin, Hichea hin amit te nin thil manlu tah tah amudoh-e.
Vadung jouse jong ating tanjin, Hijeh chun twi mal khat jong avalhapoi: Thil ipi hijongleh akiselguh jouse chu Mihemin khovah a ahinpodoh jeng jin ahi.
“Ahileh chihna hi hoilama kimudoh ding hita a, Thil hetkhen themna hi aumna hoilaiba ham?
Hiche lampi chu mihemin ahepon, Mihing chenna gamsunga jong kimudoh lou ahibouve.
Kokhuh-in, ‘Kei kosunga a um poi,’ atin; Twikhanglenin jong, ‘Keima sunga achengpoi,’ ati.
Chihna chu sana lhang jenga jong kicho theilou ding. Dangka gih tojong kilep’a kilhet thei lou ding ahi.
Ophir gama sana man a jong kisim thei lou ding, Song mantam onyx le sapphire toh kilheng theiponte.
Sana le dahkang tojong kibang lou ahin, Sana jemhoi tah tah tojong kilhet thei lou ding ahi.
Song mantam coral kiti leh crystal songjong Minphah theihoi ahilhon poi; Chihna chohna ding aman ding hi Song mantam twikoh chang manval nalai ahi.
Ethiopia gamsunga song mantam topaz kitijong Chihna to hin tekah a akibahna ding aumpon, Chihna kiti mong mong hi Sana thengsel tojong tethei hoi ahipoi.
“Chihna hi hoiya ba hung kon hiya, Thil hetkhen theina hi hoiya ba um ham?
Chihna hi mihing mitmun la akisel tan, Chunga leng vachate mu din jong akisel tai.
Kokhuh tobei le thinan jong asei lhonin, ‘Kei nin jong kanabeng lhona athu kithang kajah lhon ahibouve,” atihone.
“Pathen in vang aholdohna ding lampi ahen, Aumna mun mong chu ahenai.
Ajeh chu Pathen in leiset mong geiya amu ahin, Vannoiya thil um jouse amusoh keiye.
Pathen in khopihui jeng jong agihdol alep toh a, Twipi jeng jong adung avai atetoh teng,
Go juh ding phat atep’a thu apeh a, Van kithin’a kol phetna ding lampi asempeh teng,
Pathen in chihna chu amudoh jin aphongdoh-e; Pathen in aphutdet jin aholdoh jie.
Chutengleh Pathen in mihem jah a aseiyin, ‘Vetan, Pakai gin kiti hi chihna chu ahi,’ atin; Chule ‘Agillouva kona jamdoh kiti hi Thil hetkhen theina ahi,’ ati.
Chuphat’in Job chun athusei ban ajop kit’in aseitai.
“O kaden, masanga alha lha a nom kasah sah lai hihen, Pathen in eina chinjing jeng lai hileh
Kaluvuma Pathen thaomei anavah lai, Ama vah a keiman muthim lah kajot lai chu hileh:
Chavang nikho laiya nom kasah lai hihen, Pathento kihetna kaneiya kaponbuh chunga apansat lai hileh;
Hatchungnung Pathen in eikivoppi lai, Kajet kaveiya kachate alhatle lai chu hileh;
Kachotna lam lam bongnoi lhum jeng ahilai, Songpiho jengin jong kei dia thaotwi aputsah sah lai hileh:
Kavaikona khopi kelkot phung lang kajot lai, Kholai dunga touna pha pha kakidole lai hileh;
Gollhang hon eimutih tih akikhindoh jiuvin, Upa tehse jeng jong akipatdoh jin adingme;
Milen milalte jong thusei ngam louvin aum’uvin, Akhut’uvin akam akisip soh keijiuve;
Gamvaipoa pang ho jeng jong ahusa apaopoh aumpon, Aleiyu jong adanguva abeh den jengme;
Min anabenga ajah phat phat leh Mi nun nompa eitiuvin, Mihem mit’in amu phat jongleh Pha asasoh keiyun ahiye.
Ijeh-inem itileh keiman mivaichate Akap’a apeng peng ho chu kahuhdoh jin, Akithopi ding neilou Pabei chagate chu kapanpin ahi.
Amangthah ding konsa min jong phatthei eiboh jin, Meithai jong alungthim kakipa sah jin athanomin la asajin ahi;
Adih jengin kachonin ponsil bangin kakivon’e, Kathutan adih dan chu ponchol le delkop choltah tobang anahi.
Mitcho din mitchang te nin kapangin, Kengbai din akeng te nin kapangme.
Vaicha gentheite din mipan kapangin, Kahetphah louhel mi jengjong adihna kapanpi.
Keiman mithemmopa kihahemsah chu Aha jouse kasuh lhoh peh jin, Akamsunga aneh ban apechah kheh jong chu Akamsunga konin kasa-lhah peh jie.
Hijeh chun, ‘Mihem jabolna kimua kathi ding ahi,’ katin, ‘Kahin nikho jong akikhonna beiya neldi jat pha ding ahinai,’ tin kagel’e.
Hampa bangin twipi lah a jungkhon pansang ting, Thing bangin jan khovah vah-in kachunga daitwi hung phin lhante;
Kaminthan hi itih jong leh mangthah pontin. Kachoijing thal pin tha eipe jinginte,’ kati.
“Kasei jouse mihon lung lut tah-in angaiyun, Keiman kathumopna chu thip beh chan angaiyuve.
Keiman thu kasei jou tengleh amahon asei kit pouvin, Kathusei chu khat khat’in achunguva achui.
Mihon gotwi kang ki-ngah bangin eingah jiuvin, Twiput twikai chop ding bangin akam adouve.
Amahon aginchat lel tengu jongleh kame len, kanuiyin, Kamaivah chun amaho jong alungthoi deh sampouve.
Apipun kapangin amaho che-na ding lamhil’in kapang jin, Sepaite lah a lengpa bangin alah-uva kachenge; Alunghemte lhem lung monga pang ho bangin Kenjong alunghem ho kalhem lung mong jin ahi.
“Tua vang mi nuisat’a umdoh kahitan, Apateu uichate toh kilhona Kelngoi honte ngah a pang dinga jong kadeilou Hi tobang miho chaten jong kasanga dongjo ahivangun einuisat sat tauve.
Hitobang miho ban thahatna hi Kei dinga pannabei hi ding ahi, Ajeh chu Hitobang miho hi Ameiya meisan thei ahibouvui.
Agilkel behseh-uva aduchat phat’uvin Leitah lah tolkeo jeng jong aket jenguve.
Jaova mol-hoipah pou akilouvin, Phaipheng nahal pou akilouve; Adap tengleh ponsila akisil’uva alumsahna diuvin Longlao bal pou jong akikaldoh uvin ahi.
Hitobang miho hi mihem lah a konin akidelmang tan, Gucha anung nunga kihoh hoh jeng bangin ahoh-uve.
Lhanghoh kotong dung pouva gemun akisem’uvin. Leiko dung pou, songko dung pouva ageh-uvin ahi.
Phaiphung dung pouva a-aocheh chuh uvin, Lingnang kai noi dunga akisethom chet chut-uve.
Achateu jong panna beiyin vatui op bangin aop chel chul’un, Gamsunga konin akiphet ngimsoh keiyun abeitauve.
“Tun hiche ho hin keima la-lhangin ei-oi leuvin, Amaho seichah bep’in kaumdoh tai.
Amahon eikidah-uvin kakoma konin akikhindal soh tauve; Khohsah louhel’in achil eiset khum khum jenguve.
Ajeh chu Pathen injong kathalpi eikamlhah peh a Keijeng jong eisot lhah ahitan, Hijeh a chu amahon kei um umna Anah akisip sip jengu ahitai.
Kajet lama hitobang pannabei miho chu ahung chungsoh-un, Sel del’ in eihin deldoh jenguvin ahi; Hitobang miho hin keima dounan Manthahna ding lampi jeng asemtauve.
Keima lamlhah asuse soh hel’uvin, Hamset katona ding jeng abol be beuve; Hitobang mihopi hi Koiman jong aphoh tangpoi.
Pal vangkah lentah a hung lut bangin ahung kijot lut’un, Alailunguva eichilgoi goi jenguve.
Kichat chat’in eitoh khan, Kaki-ngaina jouse hui lhoh mang bangin amangsoh tai; Keima nei le gou jouse jong Meilhang kitolmang bangin akitolmang soh tai.
“Tun vang kasunga kahinkho jeng jong Twi kisung lha banga kisung lha ding, Genthei hesoh nikhon Keima hi eihin lap den ahitai.
Jan teng leh kagu kachangin eichip jin, Katina hin eichip chip jengin kicholdo lou kahiye.
Huham tah-in kaponsil’in eituh chah jengin, Kasangkhol chol kikanna bang hin eivei chah tai.
Kanat hin bonlhoh lah a eileh lut’in, Keima leivui le vutvam kasoh tai.
Pathen nahenga kahung taovin, Nangman neihou poi; Kading ding jengin Nangin neikhohsah tapoi.
Nangman gilou cheh cheh, engse cheh cheh-in neibol’in, Nahan thahat chun hahsa tah-in neibol gimtai.
Nangman khohuiya neikhangdoh-in, Khopihui chunga chun neitousah tai; Khopihui ahung kitol tengleh Hui lah a chun neileh le jin ahi.
Thina puilut ding neigot ahi kahenai, Mihing jousen ajotna mun mithi ina neipui ahitai.
“Ahinla hamset toh kha mi vaicha tah lei chun Thu adih a tanpeh ding adeiya Keima henga ahung taova chu Keiman achunga kakhut kalhah a thilse kabol khah am?
Hinkhoa hahsa toh kha jouse dinga kapji kahilou hiya Kahinkhoa hi vaichate kalung gimpi hilouham?
Ijeh-inem itileh thilpha kakineppi leh Thilsen eihin phaji tan, Chujongleh khovah ka-nga pet tah leh Khojin chun eihinpha paijin ahi.
Kalungsung agim lheh jengin aumthim thei tapoi; Nisim niseh-in genthei hesohnan eipha pha jenge.
Kamit kamaiya khojinin kavah len, Nichang jeng jong kamutapoi; Houbung mite lah a kading doh jin Kithopina kathumin kataojie.
Kamkeipa dingin asopi kahitan, Va-ngongsangte din aloi agol’u kahibep’e.
Kavun adup lhan katinakhem atolsoh tai, Kagu kachang jouse akitumin eileusa hen hun’e.
Semjang kasai jong thi opnan agingin, Theile kamut jong thi op ho kaginin aginge.
“Keiman kamit teni toh kigahna kaneiyin, Nu-ngah chu iti kavet lhih le ding ham?
Ipi ham chung Pathen koma keima chan ding? Hatchungnung Pathen in chung lama ipi gou eilosah ding ham?
Hamsetna hi midihlou chunga lhunga, Themmona bolte chunga toset lhungji hilou ham?
Pathen in keima lamlhah hi amulou hiya, Kakalson jat geiya asimtoh dim dem hilou ham?
“Keiman joule nal jenga vahle ho toh lam kajot khoma, Joulhepna dinga kakaljan a ahileh,
Kachonna bangin kitoh chet’in eikitepeh jeng hen, Chule lung lhalouva kaum jing hi Pathen in hehen!
Lamdih a kona kakal kason mang tah a, Kamitmu mu chu kalungthima kahol lea, Kakhut te nia jong hi Boh them khat tou abea ahileh,
Keiman katusa chu midangin nejeng hen; Chule kei dinga muchi keh jouse chu kibotdoh hen.
“Ijemtia kalungthim in eijothoa numei khattou kadei chat’a, Kaheng kakompa kotpi phunga kachan lhih lea ahileh;
Kajinun midang sumheiya achang goipeh hen lang, Chule achunga pasal dang lum jeng hen.
Ajeh chu hitobanga hi huhman a kachonset’a ahileh, Danthu dungjuiya talen peh thei mong kahi ding ahi.
Hitobang chu thina kokhuh atobeiya meikongin ahalvam tobang hintin, Hitobang meikong chun kanei kagou akah vamsoh ding ahi.
“Ijemtia kasoh pasal ham numei ham adih louva kabol’a Amaho hin kei hehna thu ahinbol tenguleh,
Keima dou dinga Pathen hung kipan ahitan, Ken ipi kabol ding hitam? Pathen in athudol ahinkhol toh tengleh Ipia kadonbut ding hitan tem?
Naobu sunga keima Eisempa ama ma mahin Hiche sohpa jong chu asemma hilou ham? Pathen khatseh chun naobua chu Keijong amajong eigondoh lhona eisem lhon hilou ham?
“Ijemtia keiman mivaichate deichat thil ka-itpeh khah a, Meithainu thilmu ding amit teni kaheimang peh a ahileh;
