Kachangseh a keiman an kaneh a, Pabeiya um chagaten an angol’uva,
Keijeng jong Pathen kapa a panga Kaneo laiya eihinvah vah jeng ahin, Kanu oisung anaobua kahung potdoh a pat Eihinvah khangpeh ahitan,
Ponsil beiya mihem khattou mangthah kamua, Mivaicha kisil ding bei akeova lum kamua,
Alungthim a aman phatthei eiboh da a, Amahin keima kelngoimul akisil’a lum salouva kakoiya,
Pabei chagate douna kakhut kalap’a, Kulpi kelkot’a eipanpi ding thutan aumnai timan a kabol’a ahileh;
Kadah abul’a lhong lha jeng hen lang, Kabanjang jong abul’a kiheh lhahen chomdoh jeng hen.
Ajeh chu Pathena kon tijat umtah hamsetna kachunga hung lhungin tin, Alal loupi masanga kilah ngam lou ding kahi.
“Ijemtia sana pouva kisong mai mai kahiya, Sana hoitah tah hi ki-ngaina kaneiya,
Kahao mai mai jeh a kipah thanom kahiya, Kakhut’a tampi nei le gou kaholdoh ahiya,
Nisa ahung sat teng nichang vemai mai kahiya, Vanthamjol’a lha ahung kitol teng kavet mai mai ahileh;
Guhthim a kalungthim hin eijol lhahsa ahiya, Kakam a jong kakhut hi guh thimcha ‘kachop heuva ahileh;
Hichepi jong hi talen manthei monga themmona hinte. Ajeh chu chung Pathen henga jousei kahi ding ahi.
“Kakitomo pipa toset jeh a kipah kahiya, Achunga thilse ahung lhun teng kichoisang kahiya,
Hitobanga hi keiman amapa chu kagaosap’a Athi nading thu kaseiya kakamsunga chonset kapotsah lou lai ahin,
Kaponbuh sunga um mihon jong ‘Sa kinehva lou koi um nalaiyai mo?’ tia asei lou ham?
Kholjin jong kholai dunga geh khovah khalou lai, Alamvai jouse dinga kakotpi honsa kakoi jing ahin;
Mihem mu dia kasuh khelna kaselmang khah a, Kalungthim sunga kathemmona kaselmanga,
Mipi kagin behseh jeh a hitia hi kabol’a, Insung mite houset ding kagin’a, Hijeh a chu kaum thip beh a Kotpi jouse kal-lhah louhel’a ka-uma ahileh;

O kaden, kathusei eingaipeh ding khatbeh um hitave leh! Kasei ding kasei chaiyin kikhut henna geiyin kaboltai, Hatchungnung pen Pathen chun Eihin donbut jeng hen! Ohe, eidoupan keima hehna asutdoh tengleh Keiman kalengkouva kakiput ding ahi!
Hichu thonmoa kalengkouva kaput le lea, Kalua kasom lhop ding lal lukhuh banga kanei ding;
Kakalsonna kalamlhah kaumchan aboncha ama kapeh a, Milen milal tah banga akom kanailut jeng ding ahi.
“Kagamsungin kachunga phu la ding akouva, Tucha maha jouse kitoh tah a ahung ka soh keiyuva,
Lhosoh ga chu man peh louva keiman kaneh khah a, Alou neipa kel’a kathisah tah a ahileh;
Suhlou chang ke-na a chun ling le khao keh hen lang, Sakol chang ke-na a hamhing louhing kehjo hen,” ati. Job thusei akichaitai.
Job chu ama le ama amitmua them akichan phat’in mi pasal thum chun adonbut dauvin ahaisoh tauve.
Hichun Ram insung mi Buz phunga mi Bar’achel chapa Elihu kitipa chu alung hang tai. Pathen in them achansah sanga Job ama le ama them akichan chu alung hanpi ahitai.
Alung hanna kit khat jong chu Job gol le pai ho mi thum chun adonbutna ding ahet loujeh-u ahikit’e; Job chu adihpoi, tia aseiyuva aphondoh vangun anel theipouve.
Hicheng mi thum ho hi ama sanga upajo cheh ahijeh-uva Elihun jong Job jah a thu asei ding chu amaho anga ngajeng anahi.
Hiche pasal thum hin adonbut kitna diu akamsungu ahom lou tobang ahi amudoh phat’a Elihu hi lung hang jah jeng ahiye.

@@Hijeh chun Buz mi Bar’achel chapa Elihu hin adonbut’in aseitai. “Kakum lamin keima khangdong kahi nalaiyin, Nang ho vang upa cheh nahitauve; Hijeh chun nang ho koma kalung gel phondoh ding hi Katijong ajan kajah jong achai.
Kei gel’a, ‘Tehse dom domin thu seiyin tin, Akum tamjo jon chihna thu hilnah ta,’ kati ahi.
Ahinla mihem sunga haitheina hu, Hatchungnung Pathen hu chun mi het khenje athemsah ahi.
Upa tehse chih cheh chinga jong ahipon, Akum tam chih cheh-in adih ahetchom ahipoi.
Hijeh a chu keiman, ‘Kasei ngaiyun, Kenjong kalung gel phongdoh inge,’
“Ven, keiman nang ho thusei jeng kangah ngah-in, Chihna thu nasei jouseu chu lung lut tah-in ka-ngaiye; Nang hon ipi sei ding ham, Tia nahol hol pet’uva pat’a ka-nga ahitai.
Keiman nathuseiyu phatah-in ka-ngaiyin, Ven, naseiyu khatchan jong Job anel lhajou poi, Chujongleh nalah-uva Athuseiho donbut thei jong naum pouve.
Ching theiyun, ‘Kachinge,’ tin sei khauvin nate; ‘Keiho thusei hi Pathena kon ahin, mihem a kon ahipoi,’ tiget’uvin natiuve.
Job in kei mong mong engkalna asei ahipoi, Hijeh chun kenjong nang ho donbut banga kadonbut lou ding ahi.
“Amaho chu ajahcha ahitauvin, donbutje jong ahetlouvu ahitai: Thu seidoh ding khat jeng chajong aneipouve.
Amaho pao louva aumjeh-uva Keiman ka-nga kakho-ngai ding ham? Hikoma adin din’uva ima seilouva aum man’uva Keiman ka-nga nga ding ham?
Keiman jong kadonbut tei ding, Kalung gel chu kenjong kaphondoh tei ding ahi.
Ajeh chu keiman sei ding tampi kaneiyin, Kalungthim sunga kadoljou tapoi.
Ven, lengpitwiyin putdohna ding avang lai ahol bangin Kalungthim ahungdoh pai ding ahi tai; Lengpitwi khumna savun peng thah bangin Amoh pohjal ding ahitan ahi.
Kalung ol theina dia thu kasei tei tei ding, Kapaodoh a kadonbut tei ding ahi.
Koima dingin langneina neiponge, Koimacha jong thujouva tahsan sah din gel ponge.
Ajeh chu keiman joule nal’a thuseije kahepon, He jongleng Eisempan eisuhmanglo ding ahi.
“Vo Job, kasei ngaiyin, Kathusei abonchan lunglut tah-in ngaiton,
Ven, keiman kakam kakan, Kakamsunga kalei jong thuseiyin apange.
Kathuseiho hin midih kahi aphongin, Kakamsunga lung thengsel’a kasei ahi.
Pathen Lhagaovin einasem ahin, Hatchungnung Pathen hun hinna eipeh ahi.
Naki-ngachat leh neidonbut’in, Ka-angsunga nasei ding thu geltoh-in, ding den’in.
Ven, Pathen dia keijong nang tobang mihem kahi; Keijong leiset them khat’a hung kisemdoh kahibouve.
Vetan imacha neiginna ding jong aumpoi, Nachunga kakhut huham behseh ponte.
“Nangin vang kajah jah a thu naseisa ahitan, Nathusei gin chu kanabenga aging nalaiye.
‘Suh khel neilouva atheng kahi,’ natin, ‘Kathengin kachunga themmona abeiye,’ nati.
‘Ven, Pathen in eidou ahibouve, Amelma a eiboljoh ahi.
Thih khaokol sung dung eichot lutsahin, Kakho-lhah najouse amelchih keuve,’ nati.
“Ven, hiche nasei hi nadih poi, Keiman nadonbut inge, Pathen chu mihem sanga lenjo ahi.
Ipi dinga nangin Pathen nakinahpi ham? ‘Pathen in kasei jouse khatcha jong eidonbut poi,’ iti nati ngam ham?
Ijeh-inem itileh Pathen in amasa lamchom khat’a thu aseiya, Chujoutengleh lamchom khatma aseiji ahin, mihemin ahechen theipoi.
Mihemte athilup’a alup’a aihmut phat, Janteng manga jong, mu neina a jong aseiya, Mihemte chu jalkhun chunga Ponse selhah banga akijam teng aseiji ahin;
Hichea hi Pathen in mihemte nabeng teni ahondoh peh a, Mihemte chu aphosaljah a ahoh kichatji ahi;
Mihem chu athilse bolna deldoh a, Akiletsahna suhmang peh ding ati ahi;
Kokhuh a lhalut ding ahinkho jong ahuhdoh peh jin, Chemjama lou dingsa ahinkho amangthah ding ahuhhing peh jin ahi.
“Mihem chu alupna jalkhun jenga jong Genthei hesoh athohsah jin asudih jie; Tang louhel’in agu achang jouse adammo sahjin Hitobang hin asudih jie.
Chuphat leh mihem in ahinkho jeng jong akidah jin, An neh ding jong achil cha jong apulji tapoi.
Kavet vet pet’in atahsa amonsuh suh jengin, Agu achang jouse jong akilangdoh tan vet thei jong ahitapoi.
Ahinkhoa kokhuh sunga lhalut dingkon ahitan, Ahinnan jong mithigam ajot ding ahitai.
Akoma hin ama panpi ding Vantil khat um hen, Sangkhat lah a kilhengdoh pa chu umleh, Mihem dinga ipi tobang chu adih ham, Seidoh peh theipa chu um hileh;
Ama chun mihem hi alungset theiya aseipeh ding, ‘Kokhuh sunga akumlhah ding khu huhdoh tan, Keiman ama lhatdohna ding Ipi hijongleh kanei nai;
Ama hi avoujang jeng jong khangdong voujang bahsah-in, Akhangdon atha phat lai tobang hisah kit’in,’ ati ding ahi.

Chutengleh mihem chu Pathen henga taova, Pathen in jong asanpeh ding, Pathen angsunga chu Mihem jong kipah thanoma hung lut ding ahi. Mihemin jong ama them achanna chu Gamtina cheng mihemte jah a aphonle ding ahi.
Chutengleh aman miho masanga la asah a, asei ding; ‘Keima kachonsen thil adihlou lam lamin kaboltai, Ahivangin lah Pathen in keima hi Kachonset to kithuh-in talen eipepoi.
Kokhuh sunga kumlha dingsa kahinkho jong Pathen in alhatdam tan, Hijeh a chu kahinkhoa hi Khovah kamu kit ding ahitai,’ ati ding ahi.
“Vetan, thil hijatpi hi Pathen in Mi khat chunga nivei thumvei cheng abolji ahi.
Kokhuh sunga kona ahinkho puidoh kit ding agot’a, Hinna khovah musah ding agot ahi.
Vo Job, lung lut’in kasei ngaiyin lang, Umthim beh-in keiman thu sei pehinge.
Hichea hi sei ding aneiya ahileh Neidonbut temin; Seijengin, Kenjong nang them kachansah nom’e.
Achutilou leh kasei ngaiphan, Thip beh chan um jengin keiman chihna thu nahil inge,” ati.
Hichun Elihun ahou pai kit’in aseitai.
“Miching hon kathusei ho hi ngaiyuvin, Chule mithem hon nanabeng hin sungun;
Mihem nephun antui le tuilou atekhah bangin, Nabengin jong thuseiho hi angai angailou apatep’e.
Kithou hitin thudih chu holdoh mongu hite, Eiho lah a thilpha chu itobang ham lhengu hite.
Ajeh chu Job hin aseiyin, ‘Keima themmona bei kahi, Kathemna Pathen in alahmang joh ahibouve;
Kadihnasa sa a mijouva eisim ahin, Suh khel neilou kahivangin eibolsetna maha hi boldam joudan ahitapoi,’ ati.
Min adai chatvaiya anuisatna twi dona don, Job tobang mihem koipen um kham?
Thilse bol mi hijat lah a lha a, Migiloute toh kiloi loiya hi?
Ajeh chu Job hin aseiyin, ‘Aman Pathena kipana abol ding hi Mihem dang khattou dinga Ipi phachom ding aumpoi,’ ati ahi.
“Hijeh chun thil hekhen them nang hon Kathusei lung nachangin ngaiyun, Pathen in thilse abol louhel ding ahin, Hatchungnung Pathen in thil dihlou abol lou ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pathen in mihem chu Anatoh dungjuiya alethuh cheh ding, Achonna alamlhah dungjui juiya bou Achunga alhunsah ding ahibouve.
Kinelna beihel’in Pathen chun thilse abol ngaipon, Hatchungnung Pathen in thu adihlou akaleh-in atan ngaipoi.
Pathen in mihem hi leiset chunga vaipoa angansea, Vannoi pumpi hi ama khohsah a avettup dia akoi hilou ham?
Pathen in alungsunga alhagao hi kinung lah hen, Ahu hi ahenga kikou lut kit leh;
Tahsa hing mihem abonchan mangthah soh hel’in tin, Mihem hi leivui leso kit ding ahitai.
“Nangman hetna naneiya ahileh hiche hi ngaiphan, Keiman kasei hi lung lut’in ngaiyin.
Thu adih-a tan ding deilouvin vai apoh theiya, Midih le mihat chu nangin mo nachan ding ham?
Lengpa jah a, ‘Pannabei nahi,’ ti-ngam ding koi hiya, Milen milal jah a, ‘Migilou’ ti-ngam ding koi ham?
Milen milal dinga lang neilou koi hiya, Mihao le mivai kibanga bol koi ham? Abonchauva hi kibang cheh a Pathen semsa akhutsoh hilou ham?
Abonchauva hi mitphet kah a thi thei, Jankim tengleh mipi akihot lhul jiuvin akitolmang tauve; Mihem khut luma lou louhel’in, Mihat lai lai jong akikai mang sohtai.
“Ajeh chu Pathen in mihem kho-lhah amelchih-in, Akalsonna lam lam ave-lhi keove.
Thilse bol miho kiselna thei ding, Khojin muthim lah jong abeitai.
Ijeh-inem itileh Pathen in Mihem koima dingin jong phat atep pon, Pathen angsunga athu kitan dia Ahung lutna ding gonsan aphat akoipoi.
Kholtoh hih jongleh mihat tah jong athecheh jeng jin, Amaho panmuna midang apansah ji tan ahi.
Amaho itobanga natong ahiu ahet themsoh ahin, Jankah leh abonchauvin Akhup athal’in alehsoh hel jin, Abonchauvin achilgoi soh ji tai.
Mihon amusoh keidin ajep jin, Abon’uvin songkul’a akhumjie.
Ajeh chu amahon Pathen nung ajui tapouvin, Lampi jouse jong donlouvin akoipeh tauve;
Hijeh chun mivaichate ka ogin kithong chu Pathen heng ahung lhung tan, Pathen in jong hitobanga Genthei hesoh ho ogin chu ajatai.
Pathen chu aumthim pet’a kon athemmo sah a, Amai aselmang tengleh kon amudoh ding ham? Mihem nampi khat hihen lang Mihem khatseh hijongleh?
Pathen hephalou min lengvai apoh a, Ama chun mipi akipalsah lou ding ahi.
“Hitobang mihem hin Pathen jah a asei khah a, ‘Keima eiphoh khopset tai; Kei vangin thilse bol kit taponge,
Neihil tan ipi kamudoh lou um am? Tukal bol kit taponge’ tia um kham?
Hitobanga nangman nadonda jeh-in Aman nangma nalethuh mongin te, tia nagel am? Ajeh chu akilhen ding nang bou nahin, Keima kahipoi; Chuti ahijeh chun ipi nahet am, Phongdoh jengin.
Hetna nei mihon keijah a seiyuvin tin, Kathusei ngaiya pang miching bon seiyunte;
‘Job hin hetoh louva thu asei ahin, Athusei jouse agilpoi,’ ati diu ahi.
Job hin migilou thuseiya aseiya adonbut jeh a Akhonna leh ama chung thu kitan ding ahi.
Ajeh chu doumah abolna chunga achonset ben, Eiho lah a jong akhut abeng len, Pathen douna dingin jong Thu aseibe be jenge,” ati.
Elihun aseibe kit nalaiyin aseitai.
“Nangman hiche hi thu adih a kitan hinte natim? ‘Hiche hi Pathen angsunga kadihna ahi,’ natim?
Nangman, ‘Ipi phatchomna kaneiya, Chonsetna neimong hijong leng ija phachom ding ham?’ natim?
Nangma jong nagol napaiho jong Keiman nadonbut inge.
Khodah-in lang vanthamjol dungpi khu vetemin, Nachung vuma kikhang meilhang jouse khu ven.
Chonset nabol ahitah leh Pathen douna ipi naboldoh hiya, Suh khelna nabolbe be jeng ahitah jongleh, Pathen koma ipi nabol ding ham?
Adih mong mong nahileh, ipi napeh ding hiya, Pathen in nangma khut’a kona ipi akisan ding ham?
Nangma gitlouna hi nang tobang mihem khat’in adoulel ahin, Nadih a ahileh mihem chaten aphat chompi ahi.
“Bolgentheina hijat ahiphat hin mipi apengjah tan, Mihatpa ban-gol hatjeh-in apeng tauve.
Ahinla amaho jong hin, ‘Eisempa Pathen hoilamba hita, Jankhang lai lai leh Kipana la hinsaji pa chu hoilam hitam?
Leiset gamsate sanga chingjoa Eisempau, Chunga leng vachate sanga chingjoa Eisempau?’ tin aholpoi.
Amaho hi othongje jun apenguvin, Pathen in adonbut poi; Mihemte kiletsah jeh a Pathen in adonbut lou ahitai.
Pathen in iti kho ajapoi, kitia, Hatchungnung chun kho amupoi kiti ding ham?
Iti nangin ama kamupoi natia, A-angsunga kathu alhungtan, kangah ngah jenge,’ nati ham?
Chule tua hi alunghan teng talen apeh loujeh a hi Mihem ten doumah abol’u hi ahet louva ki-ngaito ham?
Job’in kamkeova thu amohsei seiya, Hetna beiya thu tampi aseidoh ahi,” atitai.
EIihu chun aseibe kit nalai laiyin aseitai.
‘Them khatbeh ngaibe kit nalaiyin, Keiman kichentah-in namu chetsah inge; Ajeh chun Pathen thalhenga seibe ding Thu them khat kanei nalaiye.
Keiman gamtina konin kahetna dongkhom ing ting, Eisempa Pathen adih-e, ti kasei chet ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh keiman thujou khatcha kaseipoi, Hetna bukimkei mi khat nakoma ding ahi.
“Ven, Pathen chu hat chamkim ahin Nolnabei mihem chu donlouvin akoi ngaipoi; Thil ima hetkhenje jong Pathen chu thanei tah ahiye.
Pathen in migilou ahinghoi ngaipon, Mipha chu adihna aseidoh peh jin ahi.
Midih chunga konin amit asing jipon, Leng ho jong laltouna akhandoh a, Hiteng chuleh amaho hi ahung kiletsah jiuva, Hoithona anei tenguleh,
Aman leng ho chu thih khaovin akanjin, Genthei hesoh nan akanchal ji tai;
Chutah leh anatoh athilbol’u aphondoh pehjin, Kiletsah a aum’uva asuh khel jouseu aseipeh jie.
Min ahilnau angaina diuvin anabengu ahonpeh jin, Athemmonauva kona akisemphat loina diuvin aseipeh jie.
Amahon Pathen thu angaiyuva, Ama ahouvu leh, Ahinkho sungseuvin hao theiyun tin, Ahin laiseuva akum kuma nom asah diu ahi.
Thu angailou vanguleh chemjam a lou diu, Hetna beiya thigam ding ahiuve.
“Pathen hephaloute chu alungthima alung hang hangin, Pathen in akanchah teng jongleh kithopi thum nan apeng gingji pouve.
Khangdong cha chan athiuvin, Mi maiya jumle ja thoh-in athiuvin ahi.
Mi gentheite chu Pathen in agenthei nauva ahuhdoh jin, Genthei athoh nau chu khojah nan abolpeh-e.
Nang dinjong gentheina kona hoidohna nasempeh jin, Munlen tah a lhavang thet’in nachenge; Chujongle na-ankong dokhanga kilui jouse jong Athao theiyin atui tui jeng ahi.
“Agilou lam jengin thu natan tan jengin, Hijeh a chu thutanna le adih a thutan din namat lhon ahi.
Hijeh chun kichih theiyin Neile gouvin nalungthim alhoh mang louna ding, Nehguh tampi deichat jeh a Nakhup nathal’a nachuh louna din.
Imacha neilouho keo sugenthei louvin Nang dinga mihao jong bol gentheiyin, Athabei ho jeng noisea bol louvin Thahat tah tah gal manchah kipat ho geiyin bol’in.
Mipin apanmun cheh adalhah phat Jan hung lhun kal ngah lei geovin umdan.
Kiging phan themmona lut ding kigot dan, Ajeh chu themmona jeh a thutanna nakipui lut kha ahi.
Ven, thahat aneijeh a Pathen hi achungnung pen ahi; Ama banga mihil’a pang thei ding koi ham?
Ama kiheina ache-na ding lampi seipeh thei koi hiya, ‘Nabol kheltai,’ tia sei ngam ding koiham?
“Mihemten alachoi choi jeng Pathen natoh vahchoi ding geldoh jingin.
Mitin in hichu amusoh kei ahin, Gamla tah a panga mihem in hiche hi avet vet jeng ahi.
Ven, Pathen aloupi aletdan hi eiho hetsoh jou dol ahipoi; Ama hin kumkho jat jong Holdoh a simjou jai ahinai saipon ahi.
Pathen in aju-lhasa gotwi jeng jong anung chop doh kit’ in, Gotwi hung phinlha chengse jong alhitheng jie.
Hiche gotwi theng chu van thamjola hung ju-lha, Neng jengjunga mihem chunga hung leng lha ahiye.
Mihem koi hin meilhang hung bolji leh Kolphea meilom hung kisongji khu ahet khen ding ham?
Ven, Pathen in akimvel’a kol aphetsah sahjin, Twikhanglen bulpi jong atomjol jie.
Ajeh chu hichea kona hi aman mitin vaipi thu atanjia, Neh le chah jong neng jeng junga apeh ahibouve.
Pathen in akhut te nin kolphea kehchang akichoiyin, Adoina laitah a chu din asep lhai.
Ahung pohjal teng Pathen ipi ahi aseidoh jin, Themmona chu moh vet louva lungsat khum jeng ahi.
“Hichea hin keijong kalungthim atijan, Kalung chang achomdoh deh deh jenge.
Phaten ngaiyuvin a-ogin thongje ju pi khu, Akamsunga hung kikhongdoh ogin pi khu!
Vannoi pumpi losoh-in akithon sah jengin, Leiset kolmong geiyin kol aphetsah-in keh akisep’e.
Pathen ogin ahung kithonje ju jou tengleh, Alal loupi oson van akithinsah kit’in, A-ogin akijah jou teng jongleh Kehchang kisep ding chu atuh tang deh poi.
Kidangtah-in Pathen in o aginsah-in van akinimsah-e; Eiho hetphah hoi hilou thil jong aboljie.
Ajeh chu buhbang jah jenga jong, Leiset chunga long lhan,’ atin; Go le gotwi jah a jong ‘Hamve vun ju-lha lhonin,’ atijie.
Mitin vaipin ama natoh ahetdohna dingin, Mihem jouse khut hi mohor anam khume.
Chujou tengleh gamsa jouse jong abua alutjin, Akosunguva achengden jitauve.
Pathen in bang lhanglam a konin chimpei ahung kivei jin, Ainbang sahlam a konin phalbi huidap ahung nunge.
Pathen ahung nah haiya ahileh geltwi aumdohjin, Twichung dung jousea alhang lhangin aum jie.
Pathen in meilom lah a meilhang akhum dimset’in, Hiche meilom ho hin kol aphetsah a keh alhahsah ahi.
Pathen in meilom kitol ho hi avel vela apuilea, Mihem chenna thei vannoi leiset chunga Pathen in abol diuva athupeh chengse Asuh bulhit diuva apuile ahiye.
Leiset mite suh dihna ding ham, Lungset man a ham Pathen in ahinsol doh ahi.
“Vo Job hiche hi ngaiyin lang, Pathen natoh thilbol kidang tah ngaito din kho ngaiyin.
Itobang tah a Pathen in hichengpi hi athua anunsah a, Kol hungphe vah lap lap’a um ham, ti nahet’am?
I-atileh meilhang ho hi kipojou jouvuva, Hetna chamkim Pathen thilbol kidang tah hi nahet’am?
Lhanglam khohui jeh-in leiset akinon teng, Natichunga naponsil asat lojie.
Pathen banga nangin jong vanthamjol nasondoh theiya, Phatvet kilhajol banga natahsah thei ding ham?
Pathen henga ipi kasei diu ham neihil’-uvin, Muthim maiya kathu u kapolut ngam pouve.
Keiman thu kasei ding ahi, ti kiseipeh masah ding ha, Mihem in thu seileh asunga lut lhum ding hinam?
“Tunvang mihemin khovah ave-ngam pon, Vanthamjol jouse avahsoh hel’ a Khopihui akitolna nunga thengsel’a aum tengleh A ve-ngamji pouve.
Sahlama konin sana ban’ a bangin ahung kakitol jin, Pathen chu lal loupina tijat umtah-in akivone.
Hatchungnung Pathen chu eihon mudoh jou poutin, Thaneitah, adih a thutan, them chamkimsoh chu eiho muphah hoi ahipoi.
Hijeh a chu mihemten agin’uva, Amachang kichihsah miho chu Aman jong ija agel lou ahibouve,” atitai.
Chutah chun khopihui chimpei kivei lah a konin Pakai chun Job ahin donbut’in aseipeh tai.
“Koi hiya het toh louhel’a thu hijatpi hi aseiya, Keima lung ngaito jouse asuh chot den hitam?
Pasal phatah bangin nakong kigah-in, Keiman nadong ing ting, nangin neidonbut ding ahi.
“Leiset bulpi khom kaphupet’a chu hoiya naum am? Hetna naneiya ahileh neiseipeh temin.
Leiset hi kon alet aneo atetoh ham, nahet tei hih ding ham? Leiset chunga ageigol jamdoh a hi koi ham?
Ipi chungpena akhomko jouse hi kitung lut’a, Aning dunga songpi tanglut’a chu koipen ham?
Itih tengleh jingkah ahsi jingvalpaten lalhang a-oiyuva, Pathen chaten kipah tah a kiphalsea asah hu-uvam?
“Twikhanglen twipi akoa kona ahung lonjal ding teng, Akotpi jouse kamkhuma ting bingjia koi hiya;
Keiman twikhanglen hi meilhang jouse ponsil’a kasilpeh a, Muthim lhangkhal jin’ a jing meilhang jouse atomna kanei ahin,
Agamgi jouse kasempeh soh keiya kamelchihpeh ahin, Akotpi aboncha kagonpeh a kotkil kakam khum cheh-a,
Chutengleh, ‘Hiche geiya bou nahunga nakhokal louding, Nakithang-atpi twi kidil ho jong hichan’a tang ding ahiuve,’ Tia kaseipeh hilou ham?
Nahung penlhah a pat nahin khosunga Jingkah khovahna dinga thu naseipeh khaha, Khovah jeng jong hi Avah ngai ngaiya vah dia nahil khah am?
Hitia chu khovah hin leiset mong geiya asalvah jenga, Leiset chunga kona migiloute akithin lhahna dia?
Mohor’a leingan akinam beh le akikhel bangin, Ponsil kibum banga louva kibumji ahibouve.
Migiloute chu ameivah-u jong akimut mit jin, Aban thahat jengu jong akivobong jie.
“Twikhanglen hung putna twikum jotna nache khah tah a, Twinoi lam kokhuh thuh pen’a navale khah tah am?
Nahenga thina kotpi kelkot ho chu kiphong khai, Muthim lhangkhal kihehna kelkot ho namu khah tah em?
Leiset hi ite mong mong ham nahet khah hitam? Hicheng hi nahet’a ahileh kajah a seidoh jengin.
“Khovah lampi hoilam hiya, Muthim khojin umna hoilai ham?
Nangman agamgi jouse nakholsoh na thei, Ajotna ding lampi nahet theina ding chu?
Hicheng hi nahet’ a ahileh Nang jong hicheng hitoh penkhat hin nate; Hijeh a chu nahinkho nijat jat jong Tam behseh jenga simjou jai hilou ding ahitai!
“Nangma buhbang kikholna indunga nalut khah tah a, Gel kikholna indung chu namukhah hitam?
Hicheho hi keiman genthei nikhoa man dinga nakhol’a, Kidou nikho leh kisat nikhoa dia kakhol hilou ham?
Leiset chunga kol ahung phet’a vah ahung kikap doh teng, Vah khu hoi lama hung kondoh hoiche lam pia kijon lut thei ding ham? Hoilama kona nisolam khohui leiset chunga kithechen ham?
“Koipen hin hohtwi lonna ding songpi chunga twilam alaiya, Kehchang lenlhah nading lampi asempeh ham?
Mihem chenna louhel gama jong go juh sah a, Mihem kithahna louhel nelgama jong go juh sah ding;
Alheng alhol’a kijam gamsung jong chap nou ding goa, Leiset’a hampa louhing kesah goa koi ham?
“Gotwi hin apenna pa aneiya, Daitwi hung kailha lhaji hi kon ahin ham?
Itobang naobua kona geltwi hung pengdoh hiya, Vana kon daibang jong hi koi hinsa ham?
Twisih pi chu songtah-in ahung tahjin, Twi thuh tah maiya akidal den jin ahi.
“Nangman ahsi bombel ho khu akhaova nakangom theiya, Ngambom ahsi jong khu akhao nalhap kang theiyam?
Nangman jing valpa khu kum kihei chana napuile theiya, Ngambom uichalle achate ahsi jouse khu napuile theiyam?
Vanmuna chonnadan jouse nahetsoh hina, Leiset’a amaho chondan khu naphudoh thei ding ham?
“Na-ogin chu meilom lah a kikhodoh jouva, Twiyin nachupna dinga nakou lhah thei ding ham?
Nangman thu seipeh lechun kol hungphea, ‘Hikoma kaum’uve,’ tia naseipeh diu hinam?
Meilom lah a chihna selguh a koi hiya, Daitwi lah a het theina koiya koi ham?
Chihna thahat’a meilhang hijat simjou ding koi hiya, Vanlaijola twi kikholna jouse choh chamjou koi ham?
Itih tengleh leivui ho hi aloma kitangloma, Bon-ngan ho hi itih le kigom khom diu ham?
Nangman sakei bahkaipi dinga sahing namatpeh jouva, Sakei bahkai noute navahva thei ding hinam?
Itih teng sakei bahkaiho hi ahong sunguva koljiuva, Achang pan nauva itihleh sa achan jiu ham?
Va-ah noute khu Pathen jah dia apen pen teng leh Gilkel’a alu apei peiyuva, Aham ham’uva ahiphat leh Koipenin anneh ding apehji ham?
“Lhangvuma kolsa ho khu itih a umdoh pan hiuvam ti nahet’a, Sajuhpi ho khu anou sophat nahet’a namelchih khah am?
Lha ijat geiya gaiyuvam, ti nasim theiya, Itih phat leh soh diu ham, ti nahet’ am?
Anousona dinga itih phat phat leh kol’uva, Chutengleh anou aneijiu ham?
Anoute chu ahung hatdoh loi jin, Tollhang dunga akivah khang loi jiuve; Anoute chu apotdoh phat leh Ahung kinungle kitji tapouve.
“Mihem kon gamlah sangan acham chama alhatsah a, Sangan kaljang tah chu angonga khao asut lhah am?
Sangan chenna dia keiman nelgam hi kasem hilou hiya, Chikhuh phai jong hi sangan chenna dinga kasem hilou ham?
Sangan chun khopi sunga mihem husa jong athei chimtapon, Kangtalai tolsah pan ahohsal ogin jong ajatapoi.
Molsang dung jousea alhalen, Hamhing pou pou adelle lei.
“Nangman gambong jong nagoi thei ding hiya, Jan khatbeh jong nagancha ankonga an aneh ding hinam?
Gambong chu angonga khao nakhi thei ding hina, Phaicham dung hi louva nakaipeh ding hinam?
Atha ahat lheh jeng jeh a kisonna naneiya, Nang dia natoh hahsa sa natohsah ding hinam?
Gambong chun na-inlam ahinhol kit ding hinai, Nachangphola kona chang nahinpoh peh ding hinam?
“Va-ngongsao lhaving teni khu Patva mul le mubong mul toh tekah thei hinam?
Ajeh chu va-ngongsao hin atuijouse khu tol’a adalhah jia, Leiset khun asahlum dinga akoiji ahin;
Min akengto khattouvin chon khan tin, Gamsa khattouvin chonkeh tante, ti ageldohji tapoi.
Anoute jong ama noute hilou bangin Engse sen aboljin; Athilbol chu imacha pang lou ding ahivangin, Kichatna anei hih beh jengin ahi.
Ajeh chu Pathen in va-ngongsao hi chihna beiya asem ahin, Ima ma hetbai lamna apeh lou, achansah lou ahi.
Ahivangin va-ngongsao hi adinjanga akithina ahileh Sakol jong adeljam theiyin achunga toupa jong akichatsah jie.
“Sakol hibanga thahatsah hi nang nahiya, Angongchanga amul bahthel thula kesah hi nang nahim?
Khaokhopi banga sakol kichopsah hi nang nahim? Anah khon-gin jeng jong anasan tijat aume.
Athahat ajedoh jin phailei lai dung atinin akhot jin, Thai le teng leng jeng jung lah a jong achomlut jie.
Kichat kiti hi anuisat bep’in, alungthoi poi; Chemjam hem masanga jong anung kih deh pon ahi.
Achunga toupa thal-livathei ahamlah lah jin, Tengkol le tenglung aval lah lah jie.
Lung hangtah le lung phamotah-in tol aketjal jal’in, Sumkon akimut teng leh ading thim theipoi.
Sumkon akimut ging tengleh ‘Ha, ha,’ tin a-ao jin ahi. Gamla tah a konin jong gal gimnam a jan, Sepaite husa leh Akisat nau ogin kithong ajakeuve.
“Nangman nahil’a mu khu sangtah a leng hiya, Lhanglam nga alhaving teni ajah ji ham?
Muvanlai chunglama alentou khu nangin nahil hiya, Nang thusah a chungsanga bu akisahji ham?
Songpi chungvuma apansan bu akisemin, Songpi vum akomtong laiya achengjie.
Hikoma kon hin mat ding ganhing avelhin, Gamla tah a konin amit te nin amuphai.
Anouten jong thisan achop chop’uvin, Tolthi thilong kijamnaa ama jong aumjie,” ati.
Pakaiyin Job chu ahouvin aseitai.
“Themmona mudoh pa chun hatchungnung akinah pi ding ham? Pathento kinelpa chun hindonbut jeng hen,” ati.
Chuphat’in Job chun Pakai adonbut tai:
“Vetan, kathusei jouse la ima aphachom pon, Ipi pena kadonbut thei ding nahim? Keiman kakam kisip jeng ing ting, Thip beh chan umjo tange.
Khatvei kaseisa ahitan, Velsei sei kit taponge; Niveijen seibe kit jong leng Kaseibe thei chom ding aumtapoi,” ati.
Hichun Pakaiyin jong huipi le gopi kitho chimpei kivei lah a konin Job chu ahin donbut’in aseitai.
“Pasal phatah bangin nakong kigah tan, Keiman nadong ing ting chutengleh neidonbut ding ahi.
Nangin keijeng jong neithemmo sah a, Them nachan theina dinga keijoh neithemmosah ding ham?
Nangin Pathen banga ban-gol thahat naneiya, Pathen ogin banga nangin jong van nakinimsah jim?
“Chuti ahileh naloupina le nagunche nan kivon temin; Loupina le min than nan kivon temin.
Nalunghanna twilong bangin bung lhan lang, Mi kiletsah jouse hi ven lang sunem soh temin.
Koi koi hijongleh akiletsah ven lang Sonlha jeng temin; Migiloute chu hoikom hijongleh Adinmun laitah a chun chotphan chonlhun.
Abonchauvin leivui lah a chillut jengin lang, Leinoi langa amaiyu tompeh soh kei temin.
Chutia chu naboljouva ahivangleh kenjong natahsan ing ting, Nang hi nakhut jetlam in gal najosah ding ahinai, kati ding nahi.
“Ven, Behemoth jong khu, Nang kasem banga kasemma ahi; Bongchal bang bangin Behemoth jong hin hamhing anei.
Hiche hi akongjanga athahat kikhol ahin, A-oivun aphe lah a jong athahat kikhol ahiye.
Behemoth hin amei atung jang keiyin cedar thing abahsah jin, Akhelbuh te nia aphe jouse jong achal chet chut’e.
Agubuh jouse jong sum-eng long tobang ahin, Atahsa jeng jong thihjol tobang ahi.
“Pathen thilsem lah a thilpha pen khat ahin, Asempa chun chemjamin hindel lut tem hen!
Ajeh chu molsang jouse hin ama neh ding asep doh jin. Hiti dunga hi gamsa jouse jong lhale ahiuve.
Dim lah a pah pahcha phungnoiya akoljin, Pengphung tampi boh lah a akisel jie.
Ajeh chu dim lah a pahcha phung ho chu ama din limin apangin, Huisum phung hon aumsoh keiyin ahi.
Vadung twi soh hen ama lonvuh jeng jongleh Khoh asadeh hih hel’in, Jordan vadung soh hen lang akamsunga kitahjal jal jongleh, Kisong tah in lung mongin aumjie.
Mihem koipen hin hiche khu thihkoiya akoidoh jouva, Anah avupeh a nah-khao akhipeh ding ham?
“Nangman Leviathan khu ngakoiya nakoidoh jouva, Alei khu nasot lhah a khaova nakanchah jou ding ham?
Anah homsunga khu khaojang nathil lut’ a Akhanoi jong khu thihkoiya nakoivang jou ding ham?
Hichepi khu nahenga tao tao jenga,
Hiche khun nang to kitepna aneiya Aitih chan geiya nasoh a pang ding hinam?
Nangin hiche khu vacha banga kichepna naneiya, Na nu-ngah ho dingin khaojangin nakhipeh theina dem?
Kivei mihon aman ding’ jat kidehna aneiyuva, Sumkol veiho lah a ahoppeh diu hinam?
Nangin avun khu tenghema nasut thei ding hinai, Aluchang jong khu ngateng hema nasut lut thei ding hinam?
Achunga khun nakhut lhan lang, Nakisatpi din gel le chun nabol kit nom louhel ding ahi!
Ven, mihem kinepna athontai; Mihem chu ama mitmu jengin jong akisunemin ahi.
Koimachan jong aphindoh ngampoi, tijat aum behseh-e; Amasanga ding ngam ding koi ham?
Kisuh khahna beihel’a ama kisatpi jou koi ham? Vannoi pumpia hin khatcha jong aumpoi.
“Atahsa umdol kaseibe kit nah laiya, Athahat neh lei hel jong khu kaseibe ding ahi.
Amasang amai lama apodal vun khu kon akho-lhah jouva, Aoma gal von banga tho-ni jena kitho khu kon athilpai jou ding ham?
Koiham amasang lama kotpi hongdoh ngam achu? Aha pi gol dunga jong khu tijat jatna adimin aume.
Atungtun lamia lum tobanga atho thoa kisem ahin, Mohor kinamdet chet banga kinamdet kheh ahi.
Khat le khat kithap bitchet ahin, Akah a chuhuijangchajong kikholut theilou ahi.
Hicheho hi khat le khat akijopmat cheh uvin, Kisomlhop soh kei ahijeh-uvin loikhen jou ahipoi.
Anah hai jeng jong avah lap lap jengin. Amitchang teni jong akouleu louvin jingkah a nigui kikho abangin ahi.
Akamsunga konin meisi apahdoh lah lah jengin, Mei-al ahung lengdoh jeng junge.
Anah-hom sunga konin jong meikhu ahung kitungdoh let lut’in, Bel’a twisa kisong le chumbu kilhut tobang ahiye.
Ahusan mei-am ahung lengdoh doh jengin, Akamsunga konin meikong alengdoh doh jenge.
Angongchang jong ahama ham ahin, ahat’e; Acheteng leh amasanga mi kichat’in alamle le jenge.
Atahsa phe jouse jong akipheh det kheh jengin, Achunga chah teh a um ahijeh-in akikhin kangpoi.
Alungchang jeng jong songtah-in atah jengin, Sumhei song banga sukehhoi ahi poi.
Twilah a ahung dindoh teng jongleh Mihat tah tah jong akichajin, Twilah a lam ajot’a twi apalkeh jeng jung tengleh Miho akhup athal’in akileh jeng jiuvin ahi.
Chemjam in asat phah vangin asatbut deh poi; Tenghem hihen, chempong hihen, tenghem tah hijongleh abut’a aum deh poi.
Thih jeng jong changpol danin abol’in, Sum-eng jong thingmot bol’in abol jenge.
Thalpia kap’a deljam jou ahitapon, Songboma akisea hat tah jong chu achunga akilih lha jin ahibep’e.
Thingtum ho jong pumpeng bep’in bou agel’ in, Tenglung eotel tul’a kikhopi chu anuisat bep’e.
A-op noilamse se chu leibel kihultahsa abangin, Bonlhoh lah a chun loukai nangna thingtum kitol bangin amale ama akiphengtol jin ahi.
Bolsunga akibol’in belphul abahsah jin, Twikhanglen jeng jong bel’a thao kikang abahsah-e.
Achena nung nung avah pem pumin, Twito lam chu akang gam hitam tin min agel’e.
Leiset’a ama kibahpi aumpon, Gin neilouva kisemdoh thilsem khat ahitai.
Akichoi sang jouse ipi hileh avegol soh hel’in, Akiletsahte chilhah lah a ama hi leng ahi,” ati.
Chutah chun Job in jong Pakai jah a aseitai.
“Nangman thil ijakai nabol theiye ti kahen, Nalung ngaito chu koiman asuhmo theilou ding ahi.
Hetna beiya lung gel selguh a hi koiham?’ natin: Hijeh chun keiman kahet chetlou kaseiyin. Keiman kahet phah lou thil ho pi hi Akidang behseh jengin ahi.
‘Ngaiyin keiman naseipeh ing ting, Keiman nadong ing ting nangin neidonbut ding ahi.’ neiti;
Hichea chu keiman nang hi kanaa bou kajah nahin, Tunvang kamit’a kamu nahitai;
Hijeh chun kei le kei kakideimon. Leivui le vutvam lah a hin kalung kaheitai.” ati.

Pakaiyin thu hijat hi Job jah a asei nungin Teman mipa Eliphaz kitipa jah a chun Pakaiyin thu aseipaiyin, “Nang le nagol teni chunga kalunghan lungsatna meikong bangin a kong jenge; ajeh chu nang hon kalhachapa Job bang hin kei din thildih thudih naseipouve.

Hijeh chun tun bongchal sagi le kelngoi chal sagima gakaiyun lang kalhacha Job henga cheuvin, bongchal ho le kelngoichal ho chu kithoi nan neiyun, pumgo thilton gatoh tauvin; chutengleh kalhachapa Job khun nang ho dingin nataopeh-uvin tin, ama taona jeh a kenjong nang ho hi na-ngol dungjui uva kabol lou ding nahiuve; ijeh-inem itileh nang hon kei dingin thildih le thudih naseipouvin, kalhachapa Job bangin nachon pouve,” ati.
Hijeh chun Teman mi Eli’phaz le Shuh mi Bildad, chule Na’amath mi Zophar chun Pakaiyin ahil bang banguvin aboltauve; hichea hin Pakaiyin jong Job taona asangtai.
Job chu agolte dinga Pathen henga atao phat’in Pakaiyin Job nei le gou jouse alepeh kit’in ahi; hichea hin Pakaiyin jong masanga anei le agou sanga ajat chan ni cheh a tamjon alepeh-in ahi.

Hichun masanga akihetpi asopite pasal jong numei jong abonchan Job henga ahunguvin, ainsunga an aneh khompiuvin, avoujang natpiuvin, Pakaiyin achunga alhunsah thilse hung lhung jouse jeh chun alhem lhem’uvin, mi khat khat chun sum phabep bep le sana khutjem khat khat apeuve.

Pakaiyin jong Job chu ahung haotil laiya sangin ajona lamjoh chu phatthei aboh cheh-e; hichea hin Job chun kelngoi sang som le sang li aneiyin, sangongsang sang gup aneiyin, loukai thei cheh bongchal sang khat aneiyin, sanganpi jeng jong sang khat aneiye.
Chapa jong sagi aneiyin, chanu thum aneiye.
Achanute chu apeng masapen nu min Jemi’mah asah-in, abana ni lhinna nu min Kezi’ah asah-in, thum lhinna nu min Ker’en-hap’puch asah-e.
Gamsung jousea Job chanute tobanga numei mel-hoi dang aumpoi; apau Job in amaho jong hi asopiu pasal ho chutoh gou ahoppeh-e.
Hiche nung hin Job chu kum ja khat le kum som li ahingin, khangli geiya achapate leh atuson geiyin amun,
chujouvin Job chu hinkho lhingset’in ahingin ateh-thi mong mongtai.
